# Çökme, boş sayfa ve modül hataları
_Exported on 1/3/2026 at 17:12:53 GMT+3 from Cursor (2.2.44)_

---

**User**

çökmelerine önlem al exe ye çevir, boş sayfa hatası ve type:modulemam.js commenjs formatı tazzı hatası vermesin,

---

**Cursor**

Projeyi inceleyip sorunları tespit ediyorum. Ardından çökmeleri önleyip exe'ye çevireceğiz.


Electron ekleyip exe'ye çeviriyoruz. Çökmeleri önlemek için hata yakalama ekliyoruz. Module type sorunlarını düzeltiyoruz.


Electron ekleyip yapılandırıyoruz. Önce package.json'ı güncelliyoruz:


```json
{
  "name": "e-ticaret-masaüstü-yönetim-paneli",
  "private": true,
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "main": "dist-electron/main.js",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "vite build && electron-builder",
    "build:win": "vite build && electron-builder --win",
    "build:dir": "vite build && electron-builder --dir",
    "electron:dev": "vite build && electron .",
    "preview": "vite preview"
  },
  "build": {
    "appId": "com.eticaret.desktop",
    "productName": "E-Ticaret Yönetim Paneli",
    "directories": {
      "output": "release"
    },
    "files": [
      "dist/**/*",
      "dist-electron/**/*",
      "node_modules/**/*"
    ],
    "win": {
      "target": [
        {
          "target": "nsis",
          "arch": [
            "x64"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "icon": "build/icon.ico"
    },
    "nsis": {
      "oneClick": false,
      "allowToChangeInstallationDirectory": true
    }
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "react": "^19.2.3",
    "react-dom": "^19.2.3",
    "lucide-react": "^0.562.0",
    "recharts": "^3.6.0",
    "uuid": "^13.0.0",
    "xlsx": "0.18.5",
    "jsbarcode": "3.11.6"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "^22.14.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^5.0.0",
    "typescript": "~5.8.2",
    "vite": "^6.2.0",
    "electron": "^33.2.1",
    "electron-builder": "^25.1.8"
  }
}

```

Electron main process dosyasını oluşturuyor ve Vite yapılandırmasını güncelliyoruz:


```javascript
import { app, BrowserWindow, ipcMain } from 'electron';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';
import { dirname, join } from 'path';
import { readFileSync, writeFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync } from 'fs';

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = dirname(__filename);

// Crash prevention - Global error handlers
process.on('uncaughtException', (error) => {
  console.error('Uncaught Exception:', error);
  // Don't crash the app, just log
});

process.on('unhandledRejection', (reason, promise) => {
  console.error('Unhandled Rejection at:', promise, 'reason:', reason);
  // Don't crash the app, just log
});

let mainWindow = null;

const isDev = process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development' || !app.isPackaged;

function createWindow() {
  mainWindow = new BrowserWindow({
    width: 1400,
    height: 900,
    minWidth: 1000,
    minHeight: 600,
    webPreferences: {
      nodeIntegration: false,
      contextIsolation: true,
      enableRemoteModule: false,
      preload: join(__dirname, 'preload.js'),
      webSecurity: true,
    },
    icon: join(__dirname, '../build/icon.ico'),
    show: false, // Don't show until ready
  });

  // Show window when ready to prevent blank page
  mainWindow.once('ready-to-show', () => {
    if (mainWindow) {
      mainWindow.show();
    }
  });

  // Load the app
  if (isDev) {
    mainWindow.loadURL('http://localhost:3000');
    mainWindow.webContents.openDevTools();
  } else {
    mainWindow.loadFile(join(__dirname, '../dist/index.html'));
  }

  // Handle window closed
  mainWindow.on('closed', () => {
    mainWindow = null;
  });

  // Prevent blank page on navigation errors
  mainWindow.webContents.on('did-fail-load', (event, errorCode, errorDescription) => {
    console.error('Failed to load:', errorCode, errorDescription);
    if (!isDev && errorCode !== -3) { // -3 is ERR_ABORTED, which is normal
      mainWindow?.loadFile(join(__dirname, '../dist/index.html'));
    }
  });

  // Handle crashes gracefully
  mainWindow.webContents.on('crashed', () => {
    console.error('Renderer process crashed');
    // Reload the window
    if (mainWindow) {
      mainWindow.reload();
    }
  });
}

// App event handlers
app.whenReady().then(() => {
  createWindow();

  app.on('activate', () => {
    if (BrowserWindow.getAllWindows().length === 0) {
      createWindow();
    }
  });
});

app.on('window-all-closed', () => {
  if (process.platform !== 'darwin') {
    app.quit();
  }
});

// IPC handlers for file operations (if needed)
ipcMain.handle('read-file', async (event, filePath) => {
  try {
    if (existsSync(filePath)) {
      return readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8');
    }
    return null;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error reading file:', error);
    return null;
  }
});

ipcMain.handle('write-file', async (event, filePath, data) => {
  try {
    const dir = dirname(filePath);
    if (!existsSync(dir)) {
      mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });
    }
    writeFileSync(filePath, data, 'utf-8');
    return true;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error writing file:', error);
    return false;
  }
});

```

```javascript
import { contextBridge, ipcRenderer } from 'electron';

// Expose protected methods that allow the renderer process to use
// the ipcRenderer without exposing the entire object
contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld('electronAPI', {
  readFile: (filePath) => ipcRenderer.invoke('read-file', filePath),
  writeFile: (filePath, data) => ipcRenderer.invoke('write-file', filePath, data),
});

```

```typescript
import path from 'path';
import { defineConfig, loadEnv } from 'vite';
import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react';

export default defineConfig(({ mode }) => {
    const env = loadEnv(mode, '.', '');
    const isElectron = process.env.ELECTRON === 'true';
    
    return {
      base: './', // Important for Electron - use relative paths
      server: {
        port: 3000,
        host: '0.0.0.0',
      },
      plugins: [react()],
      define: {
        'process.env.API_KEY': JSON.stringify(env.GEMINI_API_KEY),
        'process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY': JSON.stringify(env.GEMINI_API_KEY),
        'process.env.ELECTRON': JSON.stringify(isElectron),
      },
      resolve: {
        alias: {
          '@': path.resolve(__dirname, '.'),
        }
      },
      build: {
        outDir: 'dist',
        emptyOutDir: true,
        rollupOptions: {
          output: {
            format: 'es', // ES modules
          },
        },
      },
    };
});

```

Error Boundary ekleyip hata yakalamayı iyileştiriyoruz:


```typescriptreact
import React, { Component, ErrorInfo, ReactNode } from 'react';
import { AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react';

interface Props {
  children: ReactNode;
}

interface State {
  hasError: boolean;
  error: Error | null;
  errorInfo: ErrorInfo | null;
}

class ErrorBoundary extends Component<Props, State> {
  constructor(props: Props) {
    super(props);
    this.state = {
      hasError: false,
      error: null,
      errorInfo: null,
    };
  }

  static getDerivedStateFromError(error: Error): State {
    return {
      hasError: true,
      error,
      errorInfo: null,
    };
  }

  componentDidCatch(error: Error, errorInfo: ErrorInfo) {
    console.error('ErrorBoundary caught an error:', error, errorInfo);
    this.setState({
      error,
      errorInfo,
    });
  }

  handleReset = () => {
    this.setState({
      hasError: false,
      error: null,
      errorInfo: null,
    });
  };

  render() {
    if (this.state.hasError) {
      return (
        <div className="min-h-screen bg-slate-900 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-2xl p-8 w-full max-w-2xl">
            <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
              <div className="bg-red-100 p-3 rounded-full">
                <AlertTriangle className="w-8 h-8 text-red-600" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center text-gray-800 mb-4">
              Bir Hata Oluştu
            </h2>
            <p className="text-center text-gray-600 mb-4">
              Uygulamada beklenmeyen bir hata oluştu. Lütfen sayfayı yenileyin veya uygulamayı yeniden başlatın.
            </p>
            {this.state.error && (
              <div className="bg-gray-100 p-4 rounded mb-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-700 font-mono break-all">
                  {this.state.error.toString()}
                </p>
              </div>
            )}
            <div className="flex gap-4 justify-center">
              <button
                onClick={this.handleReset}
                className="px-6 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-blue-700"
              >
                Tekrar Dene
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => window.location.reload()}
                className="px-6 py-2 bg-gray-600 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-gray-700"
              >
                Sayfayı Yenile
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      );
    }

    return this.props.children;
  }
}

export default ErrorBoundary;

```

```typescriptreact
import React from 'react';
import ReactDOM from 'react-dom/client';
import App from './App';
import ErrorBoundary from './components/ErrorBoundary';

// Crash prevention - Global error handlers
window.addEventListener('error', (event) => {
  console.error('Global error:', event.error);
  event.preventDefault(); // Prevent default error handling
});

window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', (event) => {
  console.error('Unhandled promise rejection:', event.reason);
  event.preventDefault(); // Prevent default error handling
});

// Wait for DOM to be ready
function initApp() {
  const rootElement = document.getElementById('root');
  
  if (!rootElement) {
    // Create root element if it doesn't exist
    const newRoot = document.createElement('div');
    newRoot.id = 'root';
    document.body.appendChild(newRoot);
    
    const root = ReactDOM.createRoot(newRoot);
    root.render(
      <React.StrictMode>
        <ErrorBoundary>
          <App />
        </ErrorBoundary>
      </React.StrictMode>
    );
    return;
  }

  try {
    const root = ReactDOM.createRoot(rootElement);
    root.render(
      <React.StrictMode>
        <ErrorBoundary>
          <App />
        </ErrorBoundary>
      </React.StrictMode>
    );
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to render app:', error);
    // Fallback UI
    rootElement.innerHTML = `
      <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 100vh; flex-direction: column; font-family: system-ui;">
        <h1 style="color: #ef4444; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Uygulama Yüklenemedi</h1>
        <p style="color: #6b7280; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Lütfen sayfayı yenileyin.</p>
        <button onclick="window.location.reload()" style="padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: #2563eb; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 0.25rem; cursor: pointer;">
          Yenile
        </button>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

// Initialize when DOM is ready
if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initApp);
} else {
  initApp();
}

```

```typescriptreact

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Database, User, UserRole } from './types';
import { loadDB, saveDB, setupStorageListener } from './services/db';
import { Layout } from './components/Layout';
import { Dashboard } from './components/Dashboard';
import { ProductManagement } from './components/ProductManagement';
import { OrderManagement } from './components/OrderManagement';
import { Settings } from './components/Settings';
import { Lock, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react';

const App: React.FC = () => {
  const [db, setDb] = useState<Database | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [page, setPage] = useState('dashboard');
  
  // Auth State
  const [username, setUsername] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [activeUsers, setActiveUsers] = useState<User[]>([]);

  // Initial Load
  useEffect(() => {
    const data = loadDB();
    setDb(data);
    setLoading(false);
    
    // Track active users in localStorage for multi-user support
    const currentUser = data.currentUser;
    if (currentUser) {
      const activeUsersList = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('activeUsers') || '[]');
      if (!activeUsersList.find((u: User) => u.id === currentUser.id)) {
        activeUsersList.push(currentUser);
        localStorage.setItem('activeUsers', JSON.stringify(activeUsersList));
      }
      setActiveUsers(activeUsersList);
    }
    
    // Setup storage listener for real-time updates from other sessions
    const cleanup = setupStorageListener((newDb) => {
      setDb(newDb);
    });
    
    return cleanup;
  }, []);

  // Handle user logout and update active users
  const handleLogout = () => {
    if(!db || !db.currentUser) return;
    
    // Remove user from active users
    const activeUsersList = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('activeUsers') || '[]');
    const updatedActiveUsers = activeUsersList.filter((u: User) => u.id !== db.currentUser?.id);
    localStorage.setItem('activeUsers', JSON.stringify(updatedActiveUsers));
    setActiveUsers(updatedActiveUsers);
    
    handleUpdateDB({ ...db, currentUser: null });
    setUsername('');
    setPassword('');
  };

  // Check for concurrent login attempts
  const handleLogin = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!db) return;
    
    const user = db.users.find(u => u.username === username && u.password === password);
    if (!user) {
        setError('Kullanıcı adı veya şifre hatalı.');
        return;
    }

    // Check if user is already logged in
    const activeUsersList = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('activeUsers') || '[]');
    const alreadyLoggedIn = activeUsersList.find((u: User) => u.id === user.id);
    
    if (alreadyLoggedIn) {
        setError('Bu kullanıcı zaten başka bir oturumda açık.');
        return;
    }

    // Check for same profile restriction
    const sameProfileUsers = activeUsersList.filter((u: User) => u.username === username);
    if (sameProfileUsers.length > 0) {
        setError('Aynı profilde birden fazla oturum açılamaz.');
        return;
    }

    // Login successful
    const newDB = { ...db, currentUser: user };
    handleUpdateDB(newDB);
    
    // Add to active users
    const updatedActiveUsers = [...activeUsersList, user];
    localStorage.setItem('activeUsers', JSON.stringify(updatedActiveUsers));
    setActiveUsers(updatedActiveUsers);
  };

  const handleUpdateDB = (newDB: Database) => {
    setDb(newDB);
    saveDB(newDB);
  };

  // Cleanup on page unload
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleBeforeUnload = () => {
      if (db?.currentUser) {
        const activeUsersList = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('activeUsers') || '[]');
        const updatedActiveUsers = activeUsersList.filter((u: User) => u.id !== db.currentUser?.id);
        localStorage.setItem('activeUsers', JSON.stringify(updatedActiveUsers));
      }
    };

    window.addEventListener('beforeunload', handleBeforeUnload);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('beforeunload', handleBeforeUnload);
  }, [db?.currentUser]);

  if (loading || !db) {
    return (
      <div className="flex h-screen items-center justify-center bg-slate-900">
        <div className="text-white text-lg">Yükleniyor...</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Login Screen
  if (!db.currentUser) {
    return (
        <div className="min-h-screen bg-slate-900 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
            <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-2xl p-8 w-full max-w-md">
                <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
                    <div className="bg-blue-100 p-3 rounded-full">
                        <Lock className="w-8 h-8 text-blue-600" />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center text-gray-800 mb-2">Giriş Yap</h2>
                <p className="text-center text-gray-500 mb-6">E-Ticaret Yönetim Paneli</p>
                
                <form onSubmit={handleLogin} className="space-y-4">
                    <div>
                        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Kullanıcı Adı</label>
                        <input 
                            type="text" 
                            className="mt-1 block w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm p-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                            value={username}
                            onChange={e => setUsername(e.target.value)}
                        />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Şifre</label>
                        <input 
                            type="password" 
                            className="mt-1 block w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm p-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                            value={password}
                            onChange={e => setPassword(e.target.value)}
                        />
                    </div>
                    {error && <div className="text-red-500 text-sm text-center">{error}</div>}
                    <button type="submit" className="w-full flex justify-center py-2 px-4 border border-transparent rounded-md shadow-sm text-sm font-medium text-white bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-blue-500">
                        Giriş
                    </button>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
  }

  // Authenticated App
  return (
    <Layout 
        user={db.currentUser} 
        onLogout={handleLogout} 
        currentPage={page} 
        onNavigate={setPage}
    >
        {page === 'dashboard' && <Dashboard db={db} />}
        {page === 'products' && <ProductManagement db={db} updateDB={handleUpdateDB} userRole={db.currentUser.role} />}
        {page === 'orders' && <OrderManagement db={db} updateDB={handleUpdateDB} />}
        {page === 'settings' && <Settings db={db} updateDB={handleUpdateDB} />}
    </Layout>
  );
};

export default App;

```

Module type sorunlarını çözüp build script'lerini ekliyoruz:


Electron build script'ini oluşturup package.json'daki çakışmayı düzeltiyoruz:


```javascript
import { build } from 'vite';
import { copyFileSync, mkdirSync, existsSync } from 'fs';
import { join, dirname } from 'path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = dirname(__filename);

async function buildElectron() {
  console.log('Building Vite app...');
  
  // Build Vite app
  await build();
  
  console.log('Copying Electron files...');
  
  // Create dist-electron directory
  const distElectronDir = join(__dirname, '../dist-electron');
  if (!existsSync(distElectronDir)) {
    mkdirSync(distElectronDir, { recursive: true });
  }
  
  // Copy electron files
  const electronMain = join(__dirname, '../electron/main.js');
  const electronPreload = join(__dirname, '../electron/preload.js');
  const distMain = join(distElectronDir, 'main.js');
  const distPreload = join(distElectronDir, 'preload.js');
  
  if (existsSync(electronMain)) {
    copyFileSync(electronMain, distMain);
    console.log('Copied main.js');
  }
  
  if (existsSync(electronPreload)) {
    copyFileSync(electronPreload, distPreload);
    console.log('Copied preload.js');
  }
  
  console.log('Build complete!');
}

buildElectron().catch(console.error);

```

package.json'daki script adlarını düzenliyoruz:


```json
{
  "name": "e-ticaret-masaüstü-yönetim-paneli",
  "private": true,
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "main": "dist-electron/main.js",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "node scripts/build-electron.js && electron-builder",
    "build:vite": "node scripts/build-electron.js",
    "build:win": "npm run build:vite && electron-builder --win",
    "build:dir": "npm run build:vite && electron-builder --dir",
    "electron:dev": "npm run build:vite && electron .",
    "preview": "vite preview"
  },
  "build": {

    "directories": {
```

index.html'i Electron için güncelliyoruz:


```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>E-Ticaret Masaüstü Yönetim</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <style>
      /* Windows System Fonts */
      body {
        font-family: "Segoe UI", "Meiryo", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
        background-color: #d1d5db; /* Darker gray for desktop background feel */
        overflow: hidden;
        user-select: none; /* Desktop apps usually don't allow selecting UI text */
      }
      
      /* Desktop specific overrides */
      .desktop-window {
        box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
      }

      /* Custom Scrollbar specifically for desktop feel */
      ::-webkit-scrollbar {
        width: 10px;
        height: 10px;
        background-color: #f0f0f0;
      }
      ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
        background: #cdcdcd; 
        border: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
      }
      ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
        background: #a6a6a6; 
      }
      ::-webkit-scrollbar-corner {
        background: #f0f0f0;
      }

      /* Table Styles for Desktop App DataGrid feel */
      .datagrid {
        border-collapse: collapse;
        width: 100%;
        font-size: 12px;
        background-color: white;
      }
      .datagrid th {
        background-color: #e5e7eb; /* Gray-200 */
        border: 1px solid #9ca3af; /* Gray-400 */
        padding: 4px 8px;
        text-align: left;
        font-weight: 600;
        position: sticky;
        top: 0;
        z-index: 10;
      }
      .datagrid td {
        border: 1px solid #d1d5db; /* Gray-300 */
        padding: 2px 6px;
        color: #1f2937;
      }
      .datagrid tr:nth-child(even) {
        background-color: #f9fafb;
      }
      .datagrid tr:hover {
        background-color: #dbeafe; /* Blue-100 */
        cursor: default;
      }
      .datagrid-container {
        border: 1px solid #9ca3af;
        background-color: white;
        overflow: auto;
      }

      /* Input styles */
      .desktop-input {
        border: 1px solid #9ca3af;
        padding: 2px 6px;
        font-size: 12px;
        outline: none;
      }
      .desktop-input:focus {
        border-color: #2563eb;
        background-color: white;
      }

      /* Button styles */
      .desktop-btn {
        background-color: #e5e7eb;
        border: 1px solid #9ca3af;
        color: black;
        padding: 3px 10px;
        font-size: 12px;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
      }
      .desktop-btn:hover {
        background-color: #d1d5db;
        border-color: #6b7280;
      }
      .desktop-btn:active {
        background-color: #9ca3af;
      }
      .desktop-btn-primary {
        background-color: #2563eb;
        color: white;
        border: 1px solid #1d4ed8;
      }
      .desktop-btn-primary:hover {
        background-color: #1d4ed8;
      }

      @media print {
        .no-print { display: none !important; }
        .print-only { display: block !important; }
        body { background: white; overflow: visible; user-select: text; }
        @page { margin: 0; }
      }
    </style>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/index.css">
</head>
  <body>
    <div id="root"></div>
  <script type="module" src="/index.tsx"></script>
</body>
</html>
```

Electron main.js'te icon yolunu opsiyonel yapıyoruz:


Icon yolunu opsiyonel yapıyoruz:


```javascript
import { app, BrowserWindow, ipcMain } from 'electron';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';
import { dirname, join } from 'path';
import { readFileSync, writeFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync } from 'fs';

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = dirname(__filename);

// Crash prevention - Global error handlers
process.on('uncaughtException', (error) => {
  console.error('Uncaught Exception:', error);
  // Don't crash the app, just log
});

process.on('unhandledRejection', (reason, promise) => {
  console.error('Unhandled Rejection at:', promise, 'reason:', reason);
  // Don't crash the app, just log
});

let mainWindow = null;

const isDev = process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development' || !app.isPackaged;

function createWindow() {
  const iconPath = join(__dirname, '../build/icon.ico');
  const windowOptions = {
    width: 1400,
    height: 900,
    minWidth: 1000,
    minHeight: 600,
    webPreferences: {
      nodeIntegration: false,
      contextIsolation: true,
      enableRemoteModule: false,
      preload: join(__dirname, 'preload.js'),
      webSecurity: true,
    },
    show: false, // Don't show until ready
  };
  
  // Add icon only if it exists
  if (existsSync(iconPath)) {
    windowOptions.icon = iconPath;
  }
  
  mainWindow = new BrowserWindow(windowOptions);

  // Show window when ready to prevent blank page
  mainWindow.once('ready-to-show', () => {
    if (mainWindow) {
      mainWindow.show();
    }
  });

  // Load the app
  if (isDev) {
    mainWindow.loadURL('http://localhost:3000');
    mainWindow.webContents.openDevTools();
  } else {
    mainWindow.loadFile(join(__dirname, '../dist/index.html'));
  }

  // Handle window closed
  mainWindow.on('closed', () => {
    mainWindow = null;
  });

  // Prevent blank page on navigation errors
  mainWindow.webContents.on('did-fail-load', (event, errorCode, errorDescription) => {
    console.error('Failed to load:', errorCode, errorDescription);
    if (!isDev && errorCode !== -3) { // -3 is ERR_ABORTED, which is normal
      mainWindow?.loadFile(join(__dirname, '../dist/index.html'));
    }
  });

  // Handle crashes gracefully
  mainWindow.webContents.on('crashed', () => {
    console.error('Renderer process crashed');
    // Reload the window
    if (mainWindow) {
      mainWindow.reload();
    }
  });
}

// App event handlers
app.whenReady().then(() => {
  createWindow();

  app.on('activate', () => {
    if (BrowserWindow.getAllWindows().length === 0) {
      createWindow();
    }
  });
});

app.on('window-all-closed', () => {
  if (process.platform !== 'darwin') {
    app.quit();
  }
});

// IPC handlers for file operations (if needed)
ipcMain.handle('read-file', async (event, filePath) => {
  try {
    if (existsSync(filePath)) {
      return readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8');
    }
    return null;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error reading file:', error);
    return null;
  }
});

ipcMain.handle('write-file', async (event, filePath, data) => {
  try {
    const dir = dirname(filePath);
    if (!existsSync(dir)) {
      mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });
    }
    writeFileSync(filePath, data, 'utf-8');
    return true;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error writing file:', error);
    return false;
  }
});
```


Yapılan değişiklikler:

## Tamamlanan işlemler

1. **Electron entegrasyonu**
   - `electron` ve `electron-builder` eklendi
   - Electron main process dosyası (`electron/main.js`) oluşturuldu
   - Preload script (`electron/preload.js`) eklendi

2. **Çökme önleme**
   - Global error handler'lar eklendi (uncaughtException, unhandledRejection)
   - React Error Boundary eklendi (`components/ErrorBoundary.tsx`)
   - Renderer process crash handling eklendi
   - Window reload mekanizması eklendi

3. **Boş sayfa hatası düzeltildi**
   - Root element kontrolü iyileştirildi
   - Fallback UI eklendi
   - `ready-to-show` event'i ile pencere gösterimi düzenlendi
   - Navigation error handling eklendi

4. **Module type sorunları çözüldü**
   - ES modules yapılandırması tamamlandı
   - `package.json`'da `type: "module"` korundu
   - Vite config Electron için güncellendi
   - Import map'ler kaldırıldı (CDN bağımlılığı yok)

5. **Build script'leri**
   - `scripts/build-electron.js` oluşturuldu
   - `npm run build` - Vite build + Electron builder
   - `npm run build:win` - Windows exe oluşturur
   - `npm run build:dir` - Klasör olarak build eder

## Kullanım

Exe oluşturmak için:
```bash
npm install
npm run build:win
```

Exe dosyası `release` klasöründe oluşturulacak.

Tüm hata yakalama mekanizmaları aktif. Uygulama çökmeden hataları yakalayıp kullanıcıya bilgi verecek.

```shellscript
npm install
npm run build:win
```

---

release bu klasör bulamıyorum

Release klasörü oluştu. Exe dosyası başka bir yerde açık olduğu için build tamamlanamadı. Release klasörünü kontrol ediyoruz:


Release klasörü oluştu. Exe dosyası başka bir yerde açık olduğu için build tamamlanamadı. Exe dosyası şu konumda:

**`release\win-unpacked\E-Ticaret Yönetim Paneli.exe`**

Bu exe'yi doğrudan çalıştırabilirsiniz. Installer (NSIS) oluşturmak için exe'yi kapatıp build'i tekrar çalıştırın:


**Release klasörü oluştu.**

Konum: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\kontrol - Kopya\release`

Exe dosyası: `release\win-unpacked\E-Ticaret Yönetim Paneli.exe`

Bu exe'yi doğrudan çalıştırabilirsiniz.

**Installer (kurulum dosyası) oluşturmak için:**
1. Açık olan exe dosyasını kapatın (varsa)
2. Şu komutu çalıştırın:
   ```bash
   npm run build:win
   ```

Bu işlem `release` klasöründe bir `.exe` installer dosyası oluşturur.

**Not:** `win-unpacked` klasöründeki exe dosyası da çalışır; installer gerekmez.

```shellscript
   npm run build:win
```

---

**User**

TypeError: Xe.cargoCode.toLowerCase is not a function hatası veriyor, siapriş sayfasında arama yaparken

---

**Cursor**

Sipariş sayfasındaki arama fonksiyonunu inceliyorum:


`cargoCode` bazen string olmayabiliyor. Arama fonksiyonunda güvenli kontrol ekliyorum:


Arama fonksiyonunda `cargoCode` için güvenli kontrol ekliyorum:


```typescriptreact

import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { Database, Order, OrderStatus, OrderItem, ReturnRecord, Product } from '../types';
import { RefreshCcw, Printer, Play, Filter, PauseCircle, AlertTriangle, Loader2, RotateCcw, ChevronDown, CheckSquare, Square, ClipboardCheck, FileSpreadsheet, LayoutTemplate, Save, Eye, ArrowLeftRight, Bell, FileText, SearchCheck, HardDrive } from 'lucide-react';
import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';
import * as XLSX from 'xlsx';
import { syncStockToMarketplaces, updateLocalStockWithConsistency, syncOrderStatusToMarketplaces } from '../services/integration';
// @ts-ignore
import JsBarcode from 'jsbarcode';

const uuid = () => Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);

interface Props {
  db: Database;
  updateDB: (newDB: Database) => void;
}

interface PrintElement {
    id: string;
    label: string;
    key: string; // Key in Order object or special key like 'itemsTable'
    x: number;
    y: number;
    fontSize: number;
    width?: number; // For container width
    visible: boolean;
    isBarcode?: boolean;
}

interface PrintConfig {
    paperSize: 'A4' | 'A5' | 'Thermal' | 'Custom';
    customWidth?: number;
    customHeight?: number;
    elements: PrintElement[];
    selectedPrinter?: string;
}

const DEFAULT_PRINT_CONFIG: PrintConfig = {
    paperSize: 'A4',
    selectedPrinter: 'default',
    elements: [
        { id: '1', label: 'Mağaza Adı', key: 'storeName', x: 20, y: 20, fontSize: 18, visible: true },
        { id: '2', label: 'Müşteri Adı', key: 'customerName', x: 20, y: 50, fontSize: 14, visible: true },
        { id: '3', label: 'Sipariş No', key: 'marketplaceOrderId', x: 20, y: 40, fontSize: 12, visible: true },
        { id: '4', label: 'Kargo Kodu', key: 'cargoCode', x: 130, y: 20, fontSize: 14, visible: true, isBarcode: true },
        { id: '5', label: 'Ürün Listesi', key: 'items', x: 20, y: 80, fontSize: 10, width: 170, visible: true },
        { id: '6', label: 'Tarih', key: 'orderDate', x: 150, y: 280, fontSize: 10, visible: true },
        { id: '7', label: 'Adres', key: 'deliveryAddress', x: 20, y: 60, fontSize: 10, width: 100, visible: true },
        { id: '8', label: 'Not', key: 'customNote', x: 20, y: 250, fontSize: 12, width: 150, visible: true },
    ]
};

export const OrderManagement: React.FC<Props> = ({ db, updateDB }) => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'active' | 'cancelled' | 'suspended' | 'returned'>('active');
  const [selectedOrders, setSelectedOrders] = useState<string[]>([]);
  // Search and Filter States
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [dateFilter, setDateFilter] = useState('');
  const [printedFilter, setPrintedFilter] = useState<'all' | 'printed' | 'unprinted'>('all');
  const [isSyncing, setIsSyncing] = useState(false);
  const [isStatusUpdating, setIsStatusUpdating] = useState(false);

  // Notifications
  const [notification, setNotification] = useState<{message: string, type: 'info'|'success'} | null>(null);

  // Status Filter State
  const [statusFilterOpen, setStatusFilterOpen] = useState(false);
  const [selectedStatuses, setSelectedStatuses] = useState<OrderStatus[]>([OrderStatus.NEW, OrderStatus.PROCESSING]);
  const statusDropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  // Return Modal State
  const [isReturnModalOpen, setIsReturnModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [returnOrderTarget, setReturnOrderTarget] = useState<Order | null>(null);
  const [returnQuantities, setReturnQuantities] = useState<{[barcode: string]: number}>({});

  // Order Detail Modal State
  const [detailOrder, setDetailOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);

  // Print Designer State
  const [isPrintModalOpen, setIsPrintModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [printConfig, setPrintConfig] = useState<PrintConfig>(DEFAULT_PRINT_CONFIG);
  const [printNote, setPrintNote] = useState(''); // User custom note text
  
  // Printer Detection State
  const [availablePrinters, setAvailablePrinters] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [isScanningPrinters, setIsScanningPrinters] = useState(false);

  // --- Auto-Fetch Logic ---
  useEffect(() => {
    // Only run interval if Auto Fetch is enabled in settings
    if (db.settings.enableAutoOrderFetch && db.settings.autoFetchIntervalMinutes > 0) {
      const interval = setInterval(() => {
        fetchOrdersFromMarketplaces(false); // False = Auto fetch
      }, db.settings.autoFetchIntervalMinutes * 60 * 1000);
      return () => clearInterval(interval);
    }
  }, [db.settings.autoFetchIntervalMinutes, db.settings.enableAutoOrderFetch, db.apiConfigs]);

  // Handle clicking outside filter dropdown
  useEffect(() => {
      const handleClickOutside = (event: MouseEvent) => {
          if (statusDropdownRef.current && !statusDropdownRef.current.contains(event.target as Node)) {
              setStatusFilterOpen(false);
          }
      };
      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
      return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
  }, []);

  // Notification Timer
  useEffect(() => {
      if(notification) {
          const timer = setTimeout(() => setNotification(null), 4000);
          return () => clearTimeout(timer);
      }
  }, [notification]);

  // Load saved print template on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('printConfig');
    if (saved) {
      try {
        const config = JSON.parse(saved);
        setPrintConfig(config);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Failed to load saved print config:', error);
      }
    }
  }, []);

  // Barcode Generation for Print View
  useEffect(() => {
      const timer = setTimeout(() => {
         if (window.document.querySelectorAll('.barcode-render').length > 0) {
             JsBarcode(".barcode-render").init();
         }
      }, 500); 
      return () => clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [isPrintModalOpen, selectedOrders, printConfig]); // Re-run when config changes to update live preview

  const fetchOrdersFromMarketplaces = async (isManual = false) => {
    if (db.apiConfigs.length === 0) {
        if(isManual) alert("Tanımlı API bulunamadı. Ayarlar sayfasından mağaza ekleyiniz.");
        return;
    }

    setIsSyncing(true);
    let newOrdersAddedCount = 0;
    
    let currentDbProducts = [...db.products];
    let currentDbOrders = [...db.orders];
    const barcodesToSync: { [key: string]: number } = {}; 

    for (const config of db.apiConfigs) {
        let content = [];
        
        // --- TEST MODE or API FALLBACK ---
        if (config.mode === 'TEST') {
             if (isManual || Math.random() > 0.7) {
                // ... Existing Test Mock Logic ...
                let mockVariant = { barcode: 'TEST-BARCODE', color: 'X', size: 'L' };
                let mockProductName = "Test Ürünü";
                let mockPrice = 100;

                if (currentDbProducts.length > 0) {
                    const randomProduct = currentDbProducts[Math.floor(Math.random() * currentDbProducts.length)];
                    const randomVariant = randomProduct.variants.find(v => v.barcode && v.barcode.length > 0) || randomProduct.variants[0];
                    if(randomVariant) {
                        mockVariant = randomVariant;
                        mockProductName = randomProduct.name;
                        mockPrice = randomProduct.price;
                    }
                } else {
                    mockVariant = { barcode: 'UNKNOWN-BARCODE-' + Math.floor(Math.random()*100), color: '?', size: '?' };
                }

                content = [{
                    orderNumber: `TEST-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000000)}`,
                    customerFirstName: "Test",
                    customerLastName: "Müşteri",
                    cargoTrackingNumber: `${Math.floor(Math.random() * 10000000)}`,
                    orderDate: Date.now(),
                    status: 'Created',
                    lines: [{
                        barcode: mockVariant.barcode,
                        productName: mockProductName,
                        merchantSku: `${mockVariant.color}-${mockVariant.size}`,
                        quantity: Math.floor(Math.random() * 2) + 1,
                        price: mockPrice
                    }]
                }];
             }
        } else {
            // --- LIVE MODE ---
            try {
                const auth = btoa(`${config.apiKey}:${config.apiSecret}`);
                const startDate = new Date();
                startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - 14); 
                const startDateParams = startDate.getTime();

                const url = `https://api.trendyol.com/sapigw/suppliers/${config.supplierId}/orders?orderBy=LastUpdateDate&order=DESC&size=50&startDate=${startDateParams}`;

                const response = await fetch(url, {
                    method: 'GET',
                    headers: {
                        'Authorization': `Basic ${auth}`,
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                        'User-Agent': `${config.supplierId} - SelfIntegration`
                    }
                });

                if (response.ok) {
                    const data = await response.json();
                    content = data.content || [];
                } else {
                    console.error(`API Response Status: ${response.status}`);
                }

            } catch (error) {
                console.warn(`[Live] API unavailable for ${config.storeName}.`);
            }
        }

        for (const apiOrder of content) {
            
            // Map status
            let mappedStatus = OrderStatus.NEW;
            if (apiOrder.status === 'Shipped') mappedStatus = OrderStatus.SHIPPING;
            if (apiOrder.status === 'Delivered') mappedStatus = OrderStatus.DELIVERED;
            if (apiOrder.status === 'Cancelled') mappedStatus = OrderStatus.CANCELLED;
            if (apiOrder.status === 'Created') mappedStatus = OrderStatus.NEW;
            if (apiOrder.status === 'Picking') mappedStatus = OrderStatus.PROCESSING;

            // Check if order exists
            const existingOrderIndex = currentDbOrders.findIndex(o => o.marketplaceOrderId === apiOrder.orderNumber);

            if (existingOrderIndex > -1) {
                if (currentDbOrders[existingOrderIndex].status !== mappedStatus) {
                    currentDbOrders[existingOrderIndex].status = mappedStatus;
                }
                continue; 
            }

            // ADD NEW ORDER Logic
            if (mappedStatus !== OrderStatus.NEW && mappedStatus !== OrderStatus.PROCESSING) {
                continue;
            }

            const orderItems: OrderItem[] = apiOrder.lines.map((line: any) => ({
                barcode: line.barcode || 'NO-BARCODE',
                productName: line.productName || line.merchantSku || 'Ürün adı mevcut değil',
                sku: line.merchantSku,
                color: line.merchantSku, 
                size: line.quantity + ' Adet', 
                quantity: line.quantity,
                unitPrice: line.price,
                totalPrice: line.price * line.quantity
            }));

            let isSuspended = false;

            const itemsWithSuspensionCheck = orderItems.map(item => {
                const productIndex = currentDbProducts.findIndex(p => p.variants.some(v => v.barcode === item.barcode));

                if (productIndex > -1) {
                    // PRODUCT FOUND IN DB
                    const product = currentDbProducts[productIndex];
                    const variant = product.variants.find(v => v.barcode === item.barcode);

                    if (variant) {
                        item.color = variant.color;
                        item.size = variant.size;
                        item.productName = product.name;

                        const whId = Object.keys(variant.stocks)[0] || 'wh1';
                        const currentStock = variant.stocks[whId] || 0;
                        const newStock = Math.max(0, currentStock - item.quantity);

                        // Update Local Object
                        const result = updateLocalStockWithConsistency(
                            currentDbProducts,
                            product.id,
                            variant.color,
                            variant.size,
                            whId,
                            newStock
                        );
                        
                        currentDbProducts = result.updatedProducts;

                        // Add to Sync Queue ONLY IF product exists (Not suspended)
                        result.affectedBarcodes.forEach(b => {
                            barcodesToSync[b] = newStock;
                        });
                    }
                } else {
                    // PRODUCT NOT FOUND -> SUSPENDED
                    isSuspended = true;
                }
                return item;
            });

            const newOrder: Order = {
                id: uuid(),
                marketplaceOrderId: apiOrder.orderNumber,
                storeName: config.storeName,
                status: mappedStatus,
                customerName: `${apiOrder.customerFirstName} ${apiOrder.customerLastName}`,
                deliveryAddress: apiOrder.deliveryAddress || `${apiOrder.customerFirstName} ${apiOrder.customerLastName}\n${apiOrder.address || 'Adres bilgisi mevcut değil'}\n${apiOrder.city || ''} ${apiOrder.district || ''}`,
                cargoCode: apiOrder.cargoTrackingNumber || '-',
                orderDate: new Date(apiOrder.orderDate).toISOString(),
                items: itemsWithSuspensionCheck,
                isSuspended: isSuspended
            };

            currentDbOrders.unshift(newOrder); 
            newOrdersAddedCount++;
        }
    }

    updateDB({ ...db, products: currentDbProducts, orders: currentDbOrders });
    
    // Sync stocks only for non-suspended items AND if setting is enabled
    if (db.settings.enableAutoStockSync) {
        const barcodesList = Object.keys(barcodesToSync);
        if (barcodesList.length > 0) {
            for (const [barcode, qty] of Object.entries(barcodesToSync)) {
                await syncStockToMarketplaces(db.apiConfigs, [barcode], qty);
            }
        }
    }

    setIsSyncing(false);

    if (newOrdersAddedCount > 0) {
        setNotification({
            type: 'success',
            message: `${newOrdersAddedCount} yeni sipariş sisteme düştü.`
        });
        
        try {
            const audio = new Audio('https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/2869/2869-preview.mp3');
            audio.volume = 0.5;
            audio.play().catch(() => {});
        } catch(e) {}
    } else if (isManual) {
        alert("Yeni sipariş bulunamadı. Mevcut siparişlerin durumları güncellendi.");
    }
  };

  const handleUpdateStatuses = async () => {
     setIsStatusUpdating(true);
     await fetchOrdersFromMarketplaces(true); // True for manual
     setIsStatusUpdating(false);
  };

  const toggleStatusFilter = (status: OrderStatus) => {
    if (selectedStatuses.includes(status)) {
        if(selectedStatuses.length > 1) { 
            setSelectedStatuses(selectedStatuses.filter(s => s !== status));
        }
    } else {
        setSelectedStatuses([...selectedStatuses, status]);
    }
  };

  const getFilteredOrders = () => {
    let list = db.orders;
    if (activeTab === 'cancelled') {
        list = list.filter(o => o.status === OrderStatus.CANCELLED);
    } else if (activeTab === 'suspended') {
        list = list.filter(o => o.isSuspended);
    } else if (activeTab === 'returned') {
        return []; // We handle this separately in render
    } else {
        list = list.filter(o => !o.isSuspended && o.status !== OrderStatus.CANCELLED);
        // Apply Status Filter only in Active Tab
        list = list.filter(o => selectedStatuses.includes(o.status));
    }
    
    // Apply date filter
    if (dateFilter) {
        list = list.filter(o => {
            const orderDate = new Date(o.orderDate).toISOString().split('T')[0];
            return orderDate === dateFilter;
        });
    }
    
    // Apply printed filter
    if (printedFilter === 'printed') {
        list = list.filter(o => o.isPrinted);
    } else if (printedFilter === 'unprinted') {
        list = list.filter(o => !o.isPrinted);
    }
    
    if (searchTerm) {
        const lower = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
        list = list.filter(o => 
            (o.customerName || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower) || 
            (o.marketplaceOrderId || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
            (o.storeName || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
            (String(o.cargoCode || '')).toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
            o.items.some(i => (i.barcode || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower) || (i.productName || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower))
        );
    }
    return list;
  };

  const handleClearFilters = () => {
    setSearchTerm('');
    setDateFilter('');
    setPrintedFilter('all');
    setSelectedStatuses([OrderStatus.NEW, OrderStatus.PROCESSING]);
  };

  const getFilteredReturns = () => {
      let list = db.returns || [];
      if (searchTerm) {
        const lower = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
        list = list.filter(r => 
            r.customerName.toLowerCase().includes(lower) || 
            r.marketplaceOrderId.toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
            r.item.productName.toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
            r.item.barcode.includes(lower)
        );
      }
      return list;
  };

  // --- ACTIONS ---

  const handleOrderDetailRefresh = async (order: Order) => {
    if (!db.apiConfigs.length) return;
    
    const config = db.apiConfigs.find(c => c.storeName === order.storeName);
    if (!config) return;

    try {
        setNotification({ type: 'info', message: 'Sipariş detayları güncelleniyor...' });
        
        // Fetch fresh order data from marketplace
        const auth = btoa(`${config.apiKey}:${config.apiSecret}`);
        const url = `https://api.trendyol.com/sapigw/suppliers/${config.supplierId}/orders/${order.marketplaceOrderId}`;

        const response = await fetch(url, {
            method: 'GET',
            headers: {
                'Authorization': `Basic ${auth}`,
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                'User-Agent': `${config.supplierId} - SelfIntegration`
            }
        });

        if (response.ok) {
            const data = await response.json();
            // Update order with fresh marketplace data
            const updatedOrder = {
                ...order,
                customerName: `${data.customerFirstName} ${data.customerLastName}`,
                deliveryAddress: data.deliveryAddress || order.deliveryAddress,
                cargoCode: data.cargoTrackingNumber || order.cargoCode,
                items: data.lines.map((line: any) => ({
                    barcode: line.barcode || 'NO-BARCODE',
                    productName: line.productName || line.merchantSku || 'Ürün adı mevcut değil',
                    sku: line.merchantSku,
                    color: line.merchantSku,
                    size: line.quantity + ' Adet',
                    quantity: line.quantity,
                    unitPrice: line.price,
                    totalPrice: line.price * line.quantity
                }))
            };

            // Update in database
            const updatedOrders = db.orders.map(o => o.id === order.id ? updatedOrder : o);
            updateDB({ ...db, orders: updatedOrders });
            setDetailOrder(updatedOrder);
            
            setNotification({ type: 'success', message: 'Sipariş detayları pazaryerinden güncellendi.' });
        } else {
            setNotification({ type: 'info', message: 'Pazaryerinden güncelleme başarısız.' });
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Order refresh error:', error);
        setNotification({ type: 'info', message: 'Pazaryeri bağlantı hatası.' });
    }
  };

  const handleProcessOrders = async () => {
    const ordersToProcess = db.orders.filter(o => selectedOrders.includes(o.id) && o.status === OrderStatus.NEW);
    if (ordersToProcess.length === 0) return;

    const newOrders = db.orders.map(o => {
        if (selectedOrders.includes(o.id) && o.status === OrderStatus.NEW) {
            return { ...o, status: OrderStatus.PROCESSING };
        }
        return o;
    });
    updateDB({ ...db, orders: newOrders });
    
    // Sync to marketplaces with better error handling
    try {
        await syncOrderStatusToMarketplaces(db.apiConfigs, ordersToProcess, OrderStatus.PROCESSING);
        setNotification({
            type: 'success',
            message: `${ordersToProcess.length} sipariş işleme alındı ve pazaryerlerine bildirildi.`
        });
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Marketplace sync error:', error);
        setNotification({
            type: 'info', 
            message: `${ordersToProcess.length} sipariş işleme alındı (pazaryerlerine gönderilemedi).`
        });
    }
    setSelectedOrders([]);
  };

  const handleExportOrders = () => {
      const orders = activeTab === 'returned' ? [] : getFilteredOrders();
      if (orders.length === 0 && activeTab !== 'returned') return alert("Raporlanacak veri bulunamadı.");
      
      let data = [];
      if (activeTab === 'returned') {
          data = getFilteredReturns().map(r => ({
              'Mağaza': '',
              'Sipariş No': r.marketplaceOrderId,
              'Müşteri': r.customerName,
              'Ürün': r.item.productName,
              'İade Adet': r.returnQuantity,
              'Tarih': r.returnDate
          }));
      } else {
          data = orders.map(o => ({
              'Mağaza': o.storeName,
              'Sipariş No': o.marketplaceOrderId,
              'Müşteri': o.customerName
          }));
      }

      const worksheet = XLSX.utils.json_to_sheet(data);
      const workbook = XLSX.utils.book_new();
      XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(workbook, worksheet, activeTab === 'returned' ? "Iadeler" : "Siparişler");
      XLSX.writeFile(workbook, "Rapor.xlsx");
  };

  // --- SUSPENDED ORDER CHECK ---
  const handleCheckSuspended = async (order: Order) => {
      let currentProducts = [...db.products];
      let barcodesToSync: { [key: string]: number } = {};
      let orderUpdated = false;
      let allItemsFound = true;

      const newItems = order.items.map(item => {
          // Try to find product
          const productIndex = currentProducts.findIndex(p => p.variants.some(v => v.barcode === item.barcode));
          
          if (productIndex > -1) {
               const product = currentProducts[productIndex];
               const variant = product.variants.find(v => v.barcode === item.barcode);

               if (variant) {
                   orderUpdated = true;
                   
                   // Deduct stock now since we missed it when order first came
                   const whId = Object.keys(variant.stocks)[0] || 'wh1';
                   const currentStock = variant.stocks[whId] || 0;
                   const newStock = Math.max(0, currentStock - item.quantity);

                   const result = updateLocalStockWithConsistency(
                       currentProducts,
                       product.id,
                       variant.color,
                       variant.size,
                       whId,
                       newStock
                   );
                   currentProducts = result.updatedProducts;
                   result.affectedBarcodes.forEach(b => {
                       barcodesToSync[b] = newStock;
                   });

                   return {
                       ...item,
                       productName: product.name,
                       color: variant.color,
                       size: variant.size
                   };
               }
          }
          allItemsFound = false;
          return item;
      });

      if (allItemsFound) {
          // Update Order Status
          const newOrders = db.orders.map(o => {
              if (o.id === order.id) {
                  return { ...o, items: newItems, isSuspended: false };
              }
              return o;
          });

          updateDB({ ...db, products: currentProducts, orders: newOrders });
          
          // Sync if enabled
          if (db.settings.enableAutoStockSync) {
              for (const [barcode, qty] of Object.entries(barcodesToSync)) {
                 await syncStockToMarketplaces(db.apiConfigs, [barcode], qty);
              }
          }

          setNotification({ type: 'success', message: 'Sipariş başarıyla askıdan alındı ve işlendi.' });
      } else {
          alert(`Siparişin içindeki bazı ürünlerin barkodları (${order.items.map(i => i.barcode).join(', ')}) hala sistemde bulunamadı.`);
      }
  };

  // --- Return Logic ---
  const handleOpenReturnModal = (order: Order) => {
      setReturnOrderTarget(order);
      setReturnQuantities({});
      setIsReturnModalOpen(true);
  };

  const handleConfirmReturn = async () => {
      if (!returnOrderTarget) return;
      const itemsToReturn: { item: OrderItem, qty: number }[] = [];
      returnOrderTarget.items.forEach(item => {
          const qty = returnQuantities[item.barcode] || 0;
          if (qty > 0) itemsToReturn.push({ item, qty });
      });

      if (itemsToReturn.length === 0) return alert("Lütfen iade edilecek en az bir ürün seçiniz.");

      let currentProducts = [...db.products];
      const newReturnRecords: ReturnRecord[] = [];
      const barcodesToSync: { [key: string]: number } = {};

      itemsToReturn.forEach(({ item, qty }) => {
           newReturnRecords.push({
               id: uuid(),
               orderId: returnOrderTarget.id,
               marketplaceOrderId: returnOrderTarget.marketplaceOrderId,
               customerName: returnOrderTarget.customerName,
               item: item,
               returnQuantity: qty,
               returnDate: new Date().toISOString()
           });

           const product = currentProducts.find(p => p.variants.some(v => v.barcode === item.barcode));
           if (product) {
               const variant = product.variants.find(v => v.barcode === item.barcode);
               if (variant) {
                   const whId = 'wh1'; 
                   const currentStock = variant.stocks[whId] || 0;
                   const newStock = currentStock + qty;

                   const result = updateLocalStockWithConsistency(
                       currentProducts,
                       product.id,
                       variant.color,
                       variant.size,
                       whId,
                       newStock
                   );
                   currentProducts = result.updatedProducts;
                   result.affectedBarcodes.forEach(b => barcodesToSync[b] = newStock);
               }
           }
      });

      updateDB({ ...db, products: currentProducts, returns: [...db.returns, ...newReturnRecords] });
      
      // Sync if enabled
      if (db.settings.enableAutoStockSync) {
          for (const [barcode, qty] of Object.entries(barcodesToSync)) {
              await syncStockToMarketplaces(db.apiConfigs, [barcode], qty);
          }
      }
      alert(`${itemsToReturn.length} kalem ürün iade alındı ve stoklara eklendi.`);
      setIsReturnModalOpen(false);
      setReturnOrderTarget(null);
  };

  // --- PRINT DESIGNER ---
  const handleOpenPrintModal = () => {
      if (selectedOrders.length === 0) return alert("Lütfen yazdırılacak siparişleri seçin.");
      setIsPrintModalOpen(true);
      // Simulate printer detection
      detectPrinters();
  };

  const detectPrinters = () => {
      setIsScanningPrinters(true);
      setAvailablePrinters([]);
      
      // Simulating a system scan with a timeout
      setTimeout(() => {
          setAvailablePrinters([
              "Sistem Varsayılanı (Dialog)",
              "Microsoft Print to PDF",
              "Zebra ZD420 (Termal)",
              "Argox OS-214 Plus",
              "Canon G3010 Series"
          ]);
          setIsScanningPrinters(false);
      }, 1500);
  };

  const handleElementChange = (id: string, field: keyof PrintElement, value: any) => {
      const newElements = printConfig.elements.map(el => el.id === id ? { ...el, [field]: value } : el);
      setPrintConfig({ ...printConfig, elements: newElements });
  };

  const getPageDimensions = () => {
      if (printConfig.paperSize === 'Custom') {
          return { w: printConfig.customWidth || 210, h: printConfig.customHeight || 297 };
      }
      switch(printConfig.paperSize) {
          case 'A4': return { w: 210, h: 297 }; // mm
          case 'A5': return { w: 148, h: 210 };
          case 'Thermal': return { w: 100, h: 150 };
          default: return { w: 210, h: 297 };
      }
  };

  const renderPrintPage = (order: Order, isPreview = false) => {
      const { w, h } = getPageDimensions();
      const scale = isPreview ? 1 : 1; 
      const style: React.CSSProperties = {
          width: `${w}mm`,
          height: `${h}mm`,
          backgroundColor: 'white',
          position: 'relative',
          overflow: 'hidden',
          boxShadow: isPreview ? '0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)' : 'none',
          marginBottom: isPreview ? '20px' : '0',
          border: isPreview ? '1px solid #ddd' : 'none',
          pageBreakAfter: 'always'
      };

      return (
          <div style={style} className="print-page flex-shrink-0">
              {printConfig.elements.filter(e => e.visible).map(el => {
                  const elStyle: React.CSSProperties = {
                      position: 'absolute',
                      left: `${el.x}mm`,
                      top: `${el.y}mm`,
                      fontSize: `${el.fontSize}pt`,
                      width: el.width ? `${el.width}mm` : 'auto',
                      fontWeight: 'bold',
                      color: 'black',
                      whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap'
                  };

                  let content: React.ReactNode = '';
                  
                  if (el.key === 'items') {
                      content = (
                          <table className="w-full text-xs border-collapse border border-black">
                              <thead>
                                  <tr className="bg-gray-200">
                                      <th className="border border-black p-1 text-left">Ürün</th>
                                      <th className="border border-black p-1 text-center">SKU</th>
                                      <th className="border border-black p-1 text-center">Adet</th>
                                      <th className="border border-black p-1 text-right">Fiyat</th>
                                  </tr>
                              </thead>
                              <tbody>
                                  {order.items.map((item, idx) => (
                                      <tr key={idx}>
                                          <td className="border border-black p-1">
                                              {item.productName} <br/> <span className="font-normal">{item.color} - {item.size}</span>
                                          </td>
                                          <td className="border border-black p-1 text-center font-mono">{item.sku}</td>
                                          <td className="border border-black p-1 text-center">{item.quantity}</td>
                                          <td className="border border-black p-1 text-right">{item.unitPrice.toFixed(2)}</td>
                                      </tr>
                                  ))}
                              </tbody>
                          </table>
                      );
                  } else if (el.key === 'orderDate') {
                      content = new Date(order.orderDate).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR');
                  } else if (el.key === 'customNote') {
                      content = printNote;
                  } else {
                      // @ts-ignore
                      content = order[el.key] || '';
                  }

                  if (el.isBarcode) {
                      const barcodeId = `bc-${order.id}-${el.id}`;
                      return (
                         <div style={elStyle} key={el.id}>
                             <svg 
                                className="barcode-render"
                                data-value={content as string}
                                data-format="CODE128"
                                data-height="40"
                                data-width="2"
                                data-displayvalue="true"
                             ></svg>
                         </div>
                      );
                  }

                  return <div key={el.id} style={elStyle}>{content}</div>;
              })}
          </div>
      );
  };

  const handleSavePrintTemplate = () => {
    localStorage.setItem('printConfig', JSON.stringify(printConfig));
    setNotification({
        type: 'success',
        message: 'Yazdırma şablonu kaydedildi.'
    });
  };

  const handleLoadPrintTemplate = () => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('printConfig');
    if (saved) {
      try {
        const config = JSON.parse(saved);
        setPrintConfig(config);
        setNotification({
            type: 'success',
            message: 'Yazdırma şablonu yüklendi.'
        });
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Failed to load print config:', error);
      }
    }
  };

  const triggerPrint = () => {
    JsBarcode(".barcode-render").init();
    
    // Generate PDF instead of printing
    setNotification({ type: 'info', message: 'PDF oluşturuluyor...' });

    setTimeout(() => {
        // Create a new window for PDF generation
        const printWindow = window.open('', '_blank');
        if (!printWindow) {
            setNotification({ type: 'info', message: 'Popup engellendi. Lütfen popup engelleyicisini devre dışı bırakın.' });
            return;
        }

        const ordersToPrint = db.orders.filter(o => selectedOrders.includes(o.id));
        let printContent = ordersToPrint.map(order => {
            const pageContent = renderPrintPage(order, false);
            const tempDiv = document.createElement('div');
            tempDiv.innerHTML = pageContent.props?.children || '';
            return tempDiv.innerHTML;
        }).join('<div style="page-break-after: always;"></div>');

        printWindow.document.write(`
            <!DOCTYPE html>
            <html>
            <head>
                <meta charset="UTF-8">
                <title>Sipariş Yazdırma</title>
                <style>
                    @page { margin: 10mm; }
                    body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
                    .print-page { width: 210mm; height: 297mm; position: relative; background: white; }
                    .no-print { display: none !important; }
                </style>
            </head>
            <body>
                ${printContent}
            </body>
            </html>
        `);
        
        printWindow.document.close();
        
        // Mark orders as printed
        const updatedOrders = db.orders.map(o => 
            selectedOrders.includes(o.id) ? { ...o, isPrinted: true } : o
        );
        updateDB({ ...db, orders: updatedOrders });
        
        // Wait for content to load then trigger print
        setTimeout(() => {
            printWindow.print();
            printWindow.close();
            setNotification({ type: 'success', message: 'PDF yazdırma penceresi açıldı ve siparişler yazdırıldı olarak işaretlendi.' });
        }, 1000);
    }, 800);
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full font-sans relative">
      {/* Toast Notification */}
      {notification && (
        <div className="absolute bottom-4 right-4 bg-white border border-blue-500 shadow-2xl p-4 rounded-lg z-[999] flex items-center gap-3 animate-bounce-in w-80">
            <div className="bg-blue-100 p-2 rounded-full text-blue-600">
                <Bell size={24} />
            </div>
            <div>
                <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm">Yeni Bildirim</h4>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-600">{notification.message}</p>
            </div>
            <button onClick={() => setNotification(null)} className="ml-auto text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">✕</button>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Toolstrip */}
      <div className="bg-gray-100 p-1 border-b border-gray-300 flex justify-between items-center no-print gap-2">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 overflow-x-auto">
            <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('active')} className={`desktop-btn whitespace-nowrap ${activeTab === 'active' ? 'bg-white border-blue-500 text-blue-700 font-semibold' : ''}`}>Siparişler</button>
            <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('cancelled')} className={`desktop-btn whitespace-nowrap ${activeTab === 'cancelled' ? 'bg-white border-red-500 text-red-700 font-semibold' : ''}`}>İptal Edilenler</button>
            <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('suspended')} className={`desktop-btn whitespace-nowrap relative ${activeTab === 'suspended' ? 'bg-white border-orange-500 text-orange-700 font-semibold' : ''}`}>
                Askıdaki Siparişler
                {db.orders.filter(o => o.isSuspended).length > 0 && <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-full w-4 h-4 text-[10px] flex items-center justify-center">{db.orders.filter(o => o.isSuspended).length}</span>}
            </button>
            <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('returned')} className={`desktop-btn whitespace-nowrap ${activeTab === 'returned' ? 'bg-white border-purple-500 text-purple-700 font-semibold' : ''}`}>
                İade Alınan Siparişler
            </button>
        </div>
        
        <div className="flex items-center space-x-2 shrink-0">
             {/* Status Filter */}
            {activeTab === 'active' && (
                <div className="relative" ref={statusDropdownRef}>
                    <button 
                        onClick={() => setStatusFilterOpen(!statusFilterOpen)}
                        className="desktop-btn bg-white"
                    >
                        <Filter size={12} className="mr-1"/> Durum ({selectedStatuses.length}) <ChevronDown size={10} className="ml-1"/>
                    </button>
                    {statusFilterOpen && (
                        <div className="absolute top-full right-0 mt-1 bg-white border border-gray-400 shadow-lg p-2 z-50 w-48 rounded">
                            {Object.values(OrderStatus).filter(s => s !== OrderStatus.CANCELLED).map(status => (
                                <label key={status} className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 p-1 rounded">
                                    <input 
                                        type="checkbox" 
                                        checked={selectedStatuses.includes(status)}
                                        onChange={() => toggleStatusFilter(status)}
                                    />
                                    <span className="text-xs">{status}</span>
                                </label>
                            ))}
                        </div>
                    )}
                </div>
            )}

            <div className="flex items-center bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded px-2 py-0.5 w-64">
                <Filter size={12} className="text-gray-400 mr-1"/>
                <input 
                    className="desktop-input border-none w-full p-0 focus:ring-0" 
                    placeholder="Sipariş No, Barkod, Müşteri..."
                    value={searchTerm}
                    onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                />
            </div>
            
            <button onClick={handleUpdateStatuses} disabled={isStatusUpdating} className="desktop-btn desktop-btn-primary border-blue-600">
                <RefreshCcw className={`w-3 h-3 mr-1 ${isStatusUpdating ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} /> Manuel Sipariş Çek
            </button>

            {activeTab === 'active' && (
                <>
                <div className="w-px h-4 bg-gray-300 mx-1"></div>
                <button onClick={handleExportOrders} className="desktop-btn text-green-700 border-green-300">
                    <FileSpreadsheet className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" /> Excel
                </button>
                <button onClick={handleProcessOrders} disabled={selectedOrders.length === 0} className="desktop-btn disabled:text-gray-400">
                    <Play className="w-3 h-3 mr-1 text-green-600" /> İşleme Al
                </button>
                <button onClick={handleOpenPrintModal} disabled={selectedOrders.length === 0} className="desktop-btn disabled:text-gray-400">
                    <Printer className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" /> Yazdır
                </button>
                </>
            )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* DataGrid */}
      <div className="flex-1 bg-white border border-gray-400 datagrid-container no-print">
         <table className="datagrid">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    {activeTab !== 'returned' && (
                        <th className="w-8 text-center">
                            <input type="checkbox" onChange={(e) => {
                                if(e.target.checked) setSelectedOrders(getFilteredOrders().map(o => o.id));
                                else setSelectedOrders([]);
                            }} />
                        </th>
                    )}
                    <th>Durum</th>
                    <th>Mağaza</th>
                    <th>
                        <div className="flex flex-col">
                            <span>Sipariş No</span>
                            <input 
                                type="text" 
                                className="text-xs border rounded px-1 py-0.5 mt-1" 
                                placeholder="Ara..."
                                value={searchTerm}
                                onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                            />
                        </div>
                    </th>
                    <th>
                        <div className="flex flex-col">
                            <span>Müşteri</span>
                            <input 
                                type="text" 
                                className="text-xs border rounded px-1 py-0.5 mt-1" 
                                placeholder="Müşteri ara..."
                                value={searchTerm}
                                onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                            />
                        </div>
                    </th>
                    {activeTab === 'returned' ? (
                        <>
                            <th>İade Edilen Ürün</th>
                            <th>İade Adet</th>
                            <th>İade Tarihi</th>
                        </>
                    ) : (
                        <>
                            <th>Kargo</th>
                            <th>Ürünler</th>
                            <th>
                                <div className="flex flex-col">
                                    <span>Tarih</span>
                                    <input 
                                        type="date" 
                                        className="text-xs border rounded px-1 py-0.5 mt-1" 
                                        value={dateFilter}
                                        onChange={(e) => setDateFilter(e.target.value)}
                                    />
                                </div>
                            </th>
                            <th className="w-24 text-center">İşlem</th>
                        </>
                    )}
                </tr>
                {activeTab !== 'returned' && (
                    <tr className="bg-gray-50">
                        <th colSpan={activeTab === 'returned' ? 1 : 10}>
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2">
                                <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                        <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">Yazdırılanlar:</span>
                                        <select 
                                            className="text-xs border rounded px-2 py-1"
                                            value={printedFilter}
                                            onChange={(e) => setPrintedFilter(e.target.value as 'all' | 'printed' | 'unprinted')}
                                        >
                                            <option value="all">Tümü</option>
                                            <option value="printed">Yazdırılanlar</option>
                                            <option value="unprinted">Yazdırılmayanlar</option>
                                        </select>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <button 
                                    onClick={handleClearFilters}
                                    className="text-xs bg-red-500 text-white px-3 py-1 rounded hover:bg-red-600"
                                >
                                    Filtreyi Temizle
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </th>
                    </tr>
                )}
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                 {/* Standard Orders List */}
                 {activeTab !== 'returned' && getFilteredOrders().map(order => (
                     <tr 
                        key={order.id} 
                        className={selectedOrders.includes(order.id) ? 'bg-blue-50' : ''}
                        onDoubleClick={() => {
    setDetailOrder(order);
    handleOrderDetailRefresh(order);
}}
                     >
                         <td className="text-center">
                             <input type="checkbox" checked={selectedOrders.includes(order.id)} onChange={(e) => {
                                 if(e.target.checked) setSelectedOrders([...selectedOrders, order.id]);
                                 else setSelectedOrders(selectedOrders.filter(id => id !== order.id));
                             }} />
                         </td>
                         <td>{order.status}</td>
                         <td>{order.storeName}</td>
                         <td>{order.marketplaceOrderId}</td>
                         <td>{order.customerName}</td>
                         <td>{order.cargoCode}</td>
                         <td className="text-xs">{order.items.length} Kalem</td>
                         <td>{new Date(order.orderDate).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
                         
                         <td className="text-center">
                            {activeTab === 'active' && (order.status === OrderStatus.SHIPPING || order.status === OrderStatus.DELIVERED) && (
                                <button 
                                    onClick={() => handleOpenReturnModal(order)}
                                    className="text-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-100 p-1 rounded border border-transparent hover:border-purple-200"
                                    title="İade Al"
                                >
                                    <RotateCcw size={14} /> İade
                                </button>
                            )}
                            {activeTab === 'suspended' && (
                                <button 
                                    onClick={() => handleCheckSuspended(order)}
                                    className="text-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-100 p-1 rounded border border-transparent hover:border-orange-200 flex items-center justify-center w-full"
                                    title="Barkodları Kontrol Et ve Sisteme Al"
                                >
                                    <SearchCheck size={14} className="mr-1"/> Kontrol Et
                                </button>
                            )}
                         </td>
                     </tr>
                 ))}

                 {/* Returned Items List */}
                 {activeTab === 'returned' && getFilteredReturns().map(ret => (
                     <tr key={ret.id}>
                         <td><span className="bg-purple-100 text-purple-800 px-1 text-[10px] rounded">İADE</span></td>
                         <td>-</td>
                         <td>{ret.marketplaceOrderId}</td>
                         <td>{ret.customerName}</td>
                         <td>
                             {ret.item.productName} <br/>
                             <span className="text-gray-500 text-[10px]">{ret.item.color} - {ret.item.size} ({ret.item.barcode})</span>
                         </td>
                         <td className="text-center font-bold text-red-600">{ret.returnQuantity}</td>
                         <td>{new Date(ret.returnDate).toLocaleString()}</td>
```
