```typescriptreact
                                                        <button onClick={() => handleDuplicateVariant(v)} className="text-blue-600 hover:underline mr-2">Kopyala</button>
                                                        <button onClick={() => handleDeleteVariant(v.id)} className="text-red-600 hover:underline">Sil</button>
                                                    </td>
                                                </tr>
                                            ))}
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        )}

                        {activeSubPanel === 'stock' && (
                             <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
                                <div className="mb-2 flex justify-end items-center h-8">
                                    {!isAddingWarehouse ? (
                                        <button 
                                            type="button" 
                                            onClick={() => setIsAddingWarehouse(true)} 
                                            className="desktop-btn"
                                        >
                                            Depo Tanımla
                                        </button>
                                    ) : (
                                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-white border p-1 rounded">
                                            <input 
                                                autoFocus
                                                className="desktop-input w-32" 
                                                placeholder="Depo Adı" 
                                                value={newWarehouseName}
                                                onChange={(e) => setNewWarehouseName(e.target.value)}
                                                onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && saveNewWarehouse()}
                                            />
                                            <button onClick={saveNewWarehouse} className="text-green-600 hover:bg-green-100 p-1 rounded"><Check size={14}/></button>
                                            <button onClick={() => setIsAddingWarehouse(false)} className="text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 p-1 rounded"><X size={14}/></button>
                                        </div>
                                    )}
                                </div>
                                <div className="flex-1 border border-gray-400 bg-white overflow-auto">
                                    <table className="datagrid">
                                        <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                                <th>Varyant</th>
                                                {db.warehouses.map(w => <th key={w.id} style={{textAlign:'center'}}>{w.name}</th>)}
                                                <th style={{textAlign:'right'}}>Top</th>
                                            </tr>
                                        </thead>
                                        <tbody>
                                            {(() => {
                                                const uniqueGroups: { [key: string]: Variant } = {};
                                                formData.variants.forEach(v => {
                                                    const key = `${v.color}-${v.size}`;
                                                    if (!uniqueGroups[key]) {
                                                        uniqueGroups[key] = v;
                                                    }
                                                });

                                                return Object.entries(uniqueGroups).map(([key, v]) => {
                                                    const rowTotal = Object.values(v.stocks).reduce((a: number,b: number)=>a+b, 0);
                                                    return (
                                                        <tr key={key}>
                                                            <td>{v.color} / {v.size}</td>
                                                            {db.warehouses.map(w => (
                                                                <td key={w.id} className="text-center p-0">
                                                                    <input 
                                                                        type="number" 
                                                                        className="w-full h-full border-0 text-center focus:bg-blue-50 outline-none"
                                                                        value={v.stocks[w.id] || 0}
                                                                        onChange={(e) => updateStockForGroup(v.color, v.size, w.id, Number(e.target.value))}
                                                                    />
                                                                </td>
                                                            ))}
                                                            <td className="text-right font-bold bg-gray-50">{rowTotal}</td>
                                                        </tr>
                                                    );
                                                });
                                            })()}
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                             </div>
                        )}
                    </div>
               </div>
            </div>

            <div className="p-3 border-t border-gray-300 bg-gray-100 flex justify-end gap-2">
                <button onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(false)} className="desktop-btn w-24">İptal</button>
                <button onClick={handleSaveProduct} className="desktop-btn desktop-btn-primary w-24">Kaydet</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

```

```typescriptreact

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Database, UserRole, ApiConfig } from '../types';
import { exportBackup, importBackup } from '../services/db';
import { Save, UserPlus, Trash, RotateCcw, UploadCloud, Loader2, Radio, ToggleLeft, ToggleRight, Edit, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';
import { syncBarcodeStock } from '../services/integration';

const uuid = () => Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);

interface Props {
  db: Database;
  updateDB: (newDB: Database) => void;
}

export const Settings: React.FC<Props> = ({ db, updateDB }) => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'api' | 'users' | 'system'>('api');
  const [isSyncingStocks, setIsSyncingStocks] = useState(false);

  // API Form
  const [newApi, setNewApi] = useState<ApiConfig>({ id: '', storeName: '', apiKey: '', apiSecret: '', supplierId: '', mode: 'TEST' });

  const handleAddApi = () => {
    if (!newApi.storeName || !newApi.apiKey) return alert("Mağaza adı ve API Key zorunludur");
    updateDB({ ...db, apiConfigs: [...db.apiConfigs, { ...newApi, id: uuid() }] });
    setNewApi({ id: '', storeName: '', apiKey: '', apiSecret: '', supplierId: '', mode: 'TEST' });
  };

  const handleDeleteApi = (id: string) => {
    updateDB({ ...db, apiConfigs: db.apiConfigs.filter(a => a.id !== id) });
  };

  // User Mgmt
  const [userForm, setUserForm] = useState({ id: '', username: '', password: '', name: '', role: UserRole.USER });
  const [isEditingUser, setIsEditingUser] = useState(false);

  const handleSaveUser = () => {
    if (!userForm.username || !userForm.password) return alert("Kullanıcı adı ve şifre zorunludur.");
    
    let updatedUsers = [...db.users];

    if (isEditingUser && userForm.id) {
        // Update existing user
        updatedUsers = updatedUsers.map(u => u.id === userForm.id ? { ...userForm } : u);
        alert("Kullanıcı güncellendi.");
    } else {
        // Create new user
        // Check duplicate username
        if (db.users.some(u => u.username === userForm.username)) {
            return alert("Bu kullanıcı adı zaten kullanılıyor.");
        }
        updatedUsers.push({ ...userForm, id: uuid() });
    }

    updateDB({ ...db, users: updatedUsers });
    resetUserForm();
  };

  const handleEditUserClick = (user: any) => {
      setUserForm({ ...user });
      setIsEditingUser(true);
  };

  const handleDeleteUser = (id: string) => {
    if (db.users.length <= 1) return alert("Sistemde en az 1 kullanıcı kalmalıdır.");
    
    if (confirm("Bu kullanıcıyı silmek istediğinize emin misiniz?")) {
        updateDB({ ...db, users: db.users.filter(u => u.id !== id) });
    }
  };

  const resetUserForm = () => {
      setUserForm({ id: '', username: '', password: '', name: '', role: UserRole.USER });
      setIsEditingUser(false);
  };

  const handleBulkStockUpdate = async () => {
    if (db.apiConfigs.length === 0) return alert("Pazaryeri entegrasyonu tanımlı değil.");
    
    if (confirm("DİKKAT: Veritabanındaki TÜM ürün stokları, tanımlı TÜM pazaryerlerine gönderilecek. Bu işlem zaman alabilir.\n\nOnaylıyor musunuz?")) {
        setIsSyncingStocks(true);
        
        // Group barcodes by stock quantity to make efficient batch updates
        const stockGroups: { [qty: number]: string[] } = {};
        
        db.products.forEach(p => {
            p.variants.forEach(v => {
                if (v.barcode) {
                     const total = Object.values(v.stocks).reduce((a: number, b: number) => a + b, 0);
                     if (!stockGroups[total]) {
                         stockGroups[total] = [];
                     }
                     stockGroups[total].push(v.barcode);
                }
            });
        });

        const quantities = Object.keys(stockGroups).map(Number);
        
        for (const qty of quantities) {
            const barcodes = stockGroups[qty];
            if(barcodes.length > 0) {
                 await syncStockToMarketplaces(db.apiConfigs, barcodes, qty);
            }
        }

        setIsSyncingStocks(false);
        alert("Toplu stok güncelleme işlemi tamamlandı.");
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow min-h-[500px] flex">
        <div className="w-48 border-r bg-gray-50 p-4 space-y-2">
            <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('api')} className={`w-full text-left px-4 py-2 rounded ${activeTab === 'api' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 font-bold' : 'hover:bg-gray-200'}`}>API Ayarları</button>
            <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('users')} className={`w-full text-left px-4 py-2 rounded ${activeTab === 'users' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 font-bold' : 'hover:bg-gray-200'}`}>Kullanıcılar</button>
            <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('system')} className={`w-full text-left px-4 py-2 rounded ${activeTab === 'system' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 font-bold' : 'hover:bg-gray-200'}`}>Yedekleme & Sistem</button>
        </div>

        <div className="flex-1 p-8">
            {activeTab === 'api' && (
                <div>
                    <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-6">Pazaryeri API Entegrasyonları</h3>
                    <div className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded border mb-4">
                        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                            <input className="border p-2 rounded" placeholder="Mağaza Adı (Örn: Trendyol-1)" value={newApi.storeName} onChange={e => setNewApi({...newApi, storeName: e.target.value})} />
                            <input className="border p-2 rounded" placeholder="Satıcı ID (Supplier ID)" value={newApi.supplierId} onChange={e => setNewApi({...newApi, supplierId: e.target.value})} />
                            <input className="border p-2 rounded" placeholder="API Key" value={newApi.apiKey} onChange={e => setNewApi({...newApi, apiKey: e.target.value})} />
                            <input className="border p-2 rounded" placeholder="API Secret" value={newApi.apiSecret} onChange={e => setNewApi({...newApi, apiSecret: e.target.value})} />
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mt-4">
                            <span className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-700">Entegrasyon Modu:</span>
                            <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                                <input 
                                    type="radio" 
                                    name="apiMode" 
                                    checked={newApi.mode === 'LIVE'} 
                                    onChange={() => setNewApi({...newApi, mode: 'LIVE'})} 
                                />
                                <span className="text-sm text-green-700 font-bold">CANLI (Gerçek Veri)</span>
                            </label>
                            <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                                <input 
                                    type="radio" 
                                    name="apiMode" 
                                    checked={newApi.mode === 'TEST'} 
                                    onChange={() => setNewApi({...newApi, mode: 'TEST'})} 
                                />
                                <span className="text-sm text-orange-600 font-bold">TEST (Sahte Sipariş)</span>
                            </label>
                        </div>
                        <button onClick={handleAddApi} className="w-full mt-4 bg-blue-600 text-white py-2 rounded hover:bg-blue-700">API Ekle</button>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                        {db.apiConfigs.map(api => (
                            <div key={api.id} className="flex justify-between items-center p-4 border rounded bg-white">
                                <div>
                                    <div className="font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
                                        {api.storeName}
                                        <span className={`text-[10px] px-2 rounded-full text-white ${api.mode === 'LIVE' ? 'bg-green-600' : 'bg-orange-500'}`}>
                                            {api.mode === 'LIVE' ? 'CANLI' : 'TEST'}
                                        </span>
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">{api.apiKey.substring(0, 8)}...</div>
                                </div>
                                <button onClick={() => handleDeleteApi(api.id)} className="text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 p-2 rounded"><Trash size={16} /></button>
                            </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            )}

            {activeTab === 'users' && (
                <div>
                     <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-6">Kullanıcı Profilleri</h3>
                     <div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-2 mb-6 bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded border relative">
                        {isEditingUser && (
                            <button 
                                onClick={resetUserForm}
                                className="absolute -top-3 -right-3 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-full p-1 shadow hover:bg-red-600"
                                title="İptal Et"
                            >
                                <X size={14} />
                            </button>
                        )}
                        <input className="border p-2 rounded col-span-1" placeholder="Ad Soyad" value={userForm.name} onChange={e => setUserForm({...userForm, name: e.target.value})} />
                        <input className="border p-2 rounded col-span-1" placeholder="Kullanıcı Adı" value={userForm.username} onChange={e => setUserForm({...userForm, username: e.target.value})} />
                        <input className="border p-2 rounded col-span-1" placeholder="Şifre" value={userForm.password} onChange={e => setUserForm({...userForm, password: e.target.value})} />
                        <select className="border p-2 rounded col-span-1" value={userForm.role} onChange={e => setUserForm({...userForm, role: e.target.value as UserRole})}>
                            <option value={UserRole.USER}>Personel</option>
                            <option value={UserRole.ADMIN}>Yönetici</option>
                        </select>
                        <button 
                            onClick={handleSaveUser} 
                            className={`${isEditingUser ? 'bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700' : 'bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700'} text-white rounded col-span-1 flex justify-center items-center`}
                        >
                            {isEditingUser ? <Save size={16} className="mr-2"/> : <UserPlus size={16} className="mr-2"/>}
                            {isEditingUser ? 'Güncelle' : 'Ekle'}
                        </button>
                     </div>

                     <table className="w-full text-left text-sm border-collapse border border-gray-200">
                        <thead className="bg-gray-100">
                            <tr>
                                <th className="p-2 border">Ad</th>
                                <th className="p-2 border">Kullanıcı Adı</th>
                                <th className="p-2 border">Rol</th>
                                <th className="p-2 border text-right">İşlem</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            {db.users.map(u => (
                                <tr key={u.id} className={`border-b ${isEditingUser && userForm.id === u.id ? 'bg-orange-50' : ''}`}>
                                    <td className="p-2 border">{u.name}</td>
                                    <td className="p-2 border">{u.username}</td>
                                    <td className="p-2 border">
                                        <span className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs text-white ${u.role === UserRole.ADMIN ? 'bg-purple-600' : 'bg-gray-500'}`}>
                                            {u.role}
                                        </span>
                                    </td>
                                    <td className="p-2 border text-right">
                                        <button onClick={() => handleEditUserClick(u)} className="text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-100 p-1 rounded mr-2" title="Düzenle">
                                            <Edit size={14} />
                                        </button>
                                        <button onClick={() => handleDeleteUser(u.id)} className="text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 p-1 rounded" title="Sil">
                                            <Trash size={14} />
                                        </button>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            ))}
                        </tbody>
                     </table>
                </div>
            )}

            {activeTab === 'system' && (
                <div className="space-y-8">
                     <div>
                        <h3 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Otomasyon Ayarları</h3>
                        
                        <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between border p-3 rounded bg-gray-50">
                                <div>
                                    <h4 className="font-bold text-sm">Otomatik Sipariş Çekme</h4>
                                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Belirtilen aralıklarla pazaryerlerinden yeni siparişleri kontrol eder.</p>
                                </div>
                                <button 
                                    onClick={() => updateDB({...db, settings: {...db.settings, enableAutoOrderFetch: !db.settings.enableAutoOrderFetch}})}
                                    className={`relative inline-flex h-6 w-11 items-center rounded-full transition-colors ${db.settings.enableAutoOrderFetch ? 'bg-blue-600' : 'bg-gray-200'}`}
                                >
                                    <span className={`inline-block h-4 w-4 transform rounded-full bg-white transition-transform ${db.settings.enableAutoOrderFetch ? 'translate-x-6' : 'translate-x-1'}`} />
                                </button>
                            </div>

                            {db.settings.enableAutoOrderFetch && (
                                <div className="flex items-center gap-4 p-3 ml-4 border-l-2 border-gray-300">
                                    <label className="text-sm font-medium">Sipariş Çekme Aralığı (dk):</label>
                                    <input 
                                        type="number" 
                                        className="border p-1 rounded w-20 text-center"
                                        value={db.settings.autoFetchIntervalMinutes}
                                        onChange={(e) => updateDB({...db, settings: {...db.settings, autoFetchIntervalMinutes: Number(e.target.value)}})}
                                    />
                                </div>
                            )}

                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between border p-3 rounded bg-gray-50">
                                <div>
                                    <h4 className="font-bold text-sm">Otomatik Stok Gönderimi</h4>
                                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Ürün stoğu değiştiğinde veya sipariş geldiğinde pazaryerlerine anlık güncelleme gönderir.</p>
                                </div>
                                <button 
                                    onClick={() => updateDB({...db, settings: {...db.settings, enableAutoStockSync: !db.settings.enableAutoStockSync}})}
                                    className={`relative inline-flex h-6 w-11 items-center rounded-full transition-colors ${db.settings.enableAutoStockSync ? 'bg-green-600' : 'bg-gray-200'}`}
                                >
                                    <span className={`inline-block h-4 w-4 transform rounded-full bg-white transition-transform ${db.settings.enableAutoStockSync ? 'translate-x-6' : 'translate-x-1'}`} />
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                     </div>

                     <div className="border-t pt-6">
                         <h3 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Manuel İşlemler</h3>
                         <div className="bg-orange-50 p-4 border border-orange-200 rounded">
                             <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                                 <div>
                                     <h4 className="font-bold text-orange-800">Tüm Stokları Yeniden Gönder</h4>
                                     <p className="text-xs text-orange-700 mt-1">
                                         Veritabanındaki TÜM ürün stoklarını pazaryerlerine zorla gönderir.
                                     </p>
                                 </div>
                                 <button 
                                    onClick={handleBulkStockUpdate} 
                                    disabled={isSyncingStocks}
                                    className="bg-orange-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded hover:bg-orange-700 disabled:opacity-50 flex items-center"
                                 >
                                     {isSyncingStocks ? <Loader2 className="animate-spin mr-2"/> : <UploadCloud className="mr-2"/>}
                                     Şimdi Gönder
                                 </button>
                             </div>
                         </div>
                     </div>

                     <div className="border-t pt-6">
                        <h3 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Veri Yedekleme</h3>
                        <div className="flex gap-4">
                            <button onClick={exportBackup} className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded flex items-center hover:bg-indigo-700">
                                <Save className="mr-2" /> Yedeği İndir
                            </button>
                            <label className="bg-gray-600 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded flex items-center hover:bg-gray-700 cursor-pointer">
                                <RotateCcw className="mr-2" /> Yedeği Geri Yükle
                                <input type="file" className="hidden" accept=".json" onChange={(e) => {
                                    if(e.target.files?.[0]) importBackup(e.target.files[0], () => window.location.reload());
                                }} />
                            </label>
                        </div>
                     </div>
                </div>
            )}
        </div>
    </div>
  );
};

```

```typescriptreact

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Database, UserRole, ApiConfig } from '../types';
import { exportBackup, importBackup } from '../services/db';
import { Save, UserPlus, Trash, RotateCcw, UploadCloud, Loader2, Radio, ToggleLeft, ToggleRight, Edit, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';
import { syncBarcodeStock } from '../services/integration';

const uuid = () => Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);

interface Props {
  db: Database;
  updateDB: (newDB: Database) => void;
}

export const Settings: React.FC<Props> = ({ db, updateDB }) => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'api' | 'users' | 'system'>('api');
  const [isSyncingStocks, setIsSyncingStocks] = useState(false);

  // API Form
  const [newApi, setNewApi] = useState<ApiConfig>({ id: '', storeName: '', apiKey: '', apiSecret: '', supplierId: '', mode: 'TEST' });

  const handleAddApi = () => {
    if (!newApi.storeName || !newApi.apiKey) return alert("Mağaza adı ve API Key zorunludur");
    updateDB({ ...db, apiConfigs: [...db.apiConfigs, { ...newApi, id: uuid() }] });
    setNewApi({ id: '', storeName: '', apiKey: '', apiSecret: '', supplierId: '', mode: 'TEST' });
  };

  const handleDeleteApi = (id: string) => {
    updateDB({ ...db, apiConfigs: db.apiConfigs.filter(a => a.id !== id) });
  };

  // User Mgmt
  const [userForm, setUserForm] = useState({ id: '', username: '', password: '', name: '', role: UserRole.USER });
  const [isEditingUser, setIsEditingUser] = useState(false);

  const handleSaveUser = () => {
    if (!userForm.username || !userForm.password) return alert("Kullanıcı adı ve şifre zorunludur.");
    
    let updatedUsers = [...db.users];

    if (isEditingUser && userForm.id) {
        // Update existing user
        updatedUsers = updatedUsers.map(u => u.id === userForm.id ? { ...userForm } : u);
        alert("Kullanıcı güncellendi.");
    } else {
        // Create new user
        // Check duplicate username
        if (db.users.some(u => u.username === userForm.username)) {
            return alert("Bu kullanıcı adı zaten kullanılıyor.");
        }
        updatedUsers.push({ ...userForm, id: uuid() });
    }

    updateDB({ ...db, users: updatedUsers });
    resetUserForm();
  };

  const handleEditUserClick = (user: any) => {
      setUserForm({ ...user });
      setIsEditingUser(true);
  };

  const handleDeleteUser = (id: string) => {
    if (db.users.length <= 1) return alert("Sistemde en az 1 kullanıcı kalmalıdır.");
    
    if (confirm("Bu kullanıcıyı silmek istediğinize emin misiniz?")) {
        updateDB({ ...db, users: db.users.filter(u => u.id !== id) });
    }
  };

  const resetUserForm = () => {
      setUserForm({ id: '', username: '', password: '', name: '', role: UserRole.USER });
      setIsEditingUser(false);
  };

  const handleBulkStockUpdate = async () => {
    if (db.apiConfigs.length === 0) return alert("Pazaryeri entegrasyonu tanımlı değil.");
    
    if (confirm("DİKKAT: Veritabanındaki TÜM ürün stokları (barkod bazlı), tanımlı TÜM pazaryerlerine gönderilecek. Bu işlem zaman alabilir.\n\nOnaylıyor musunuz?")) {
        setIsSyncingStocks(true);
        
        // Tüm barkodları ve stoklarını topla (barkod bazlı)
        const barcodesToSync: { [barcode: string]: number } = {};
        let totalBarcodes = 0;
        
        db.products.forEach(p => {
            p.variants.forEach(v => {
                if (v.barcode) {
                    // Her barkod için kendi stok değerini hesapla
                    const totalStock = Object.values(v.stocks).reduce((a: number, b: number) => a + b, 0);
                    barcodesToSync[v.barcode] = totalStock;
                    totalBarcodes++;
                }
            });
        });

        let successCount = 0;
        let errorCount = 0;
        
        // Her barkod için ayrı ayrı stok gönder
        for (const [barcode, qty] of Object.entries(barcodesToSync)) {
            try {
                await syncBarcodeStock(db.apiConfigs, barcode, qty);
                successCount++;
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(`Barkod ${barcode} stok gönderim hatası:`, error);
                errorCount++;
            }
            // Progress göster (her 10 barkodda bir)
            if ((successCount + errorCount) % 10 === 0) {
                console.log(`İlerleme: ${successCount + errorCount}/${totalBarcodes} barkod işlendi...`);
            }
        }

        setIsSyncingStocks(false);
        
        if (errorCount > 0) {
            alert(`Toplu stok güncelleme tamamlandı.\nBaşarılı: ${successCount} barkod\nHatalı: ${errorCount} barkod`);
        } else {
            alert(`Toplu stok güncelleme tamamlandı.\n${successCount} barkodun stok bilgileri pazaryerlerine gönderildi.`);
        }
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow min-h-[500px] flex">
        <div className="w-48 border-r bg-gray-50 p-4 space-y-2">
            <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('api')} className={`w-full text-left px-4 py-2 rounded ${activeTab === 'api' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 font-bold' : 'hover:bg-gray-200'}`}>API Ayarları</button>
            <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('users')} className={`w-full text-left px-4 py-2 rounded ${activeTab === 'users' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 font-bold' : 'hover:bg-gray-200'}`}>Kullanıcılar</button>
            <button onClick={() => setActiveTab('system')} className={`w-full text-left px-4 py-2 rounded ${activeTab === 'system' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 font-bold' : 'hover:bg-gray-200'}`}>Yedekleme & Sistem</button>
        </div>

        <div className="flex-1 p-8">
            {activeTab === 'api' && (
                <div>
                    <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-6">Pazaryeri API Entegrasyonları</h3>
                    <div className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded border mb-4">
                        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                            <input className="border p-2 rounded" placeholder="Mağaza Adı (Örn: Trendyol-1)" value={newApi.storeName} onChange={e => setNewApi({...newApi, storeName: e.target.value})} />
                            <input className="border p-2 rounded" placeholder="Satıcı ID (Supplier ID)" value={newApi.supplierId} onChange={e => setNewApi({...newApi, supplierId: e.target.value})} />
                            <input className="border p-2 rounded" placeholder="API Key" value={newApi.apiKey} onChange={e => setNewApi({...newApi, apiKey: e.target.value})} />
                            <input className="border p-2 rounded" placeholder="API Secret" value={newApi.apiSecret} onChange={e => setNewApi({...newApi, apiSecret: e.target.value})} />
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mt-4">
                            <span className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-700">Entegrasyon Modu:</span>
                            <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                                <input 
                                    type="radio" 
                                    name="apiMode" 
                                    checked={newApi.mode === 'LIVE'} 
                                    onChange={() => setNewApi({...newApi, mode: 'LIVE'})} 
                                />
                                <span className="text-sm text-green-700 font-bold">CANLI (Gerçek Veri)</span>
                            </label>
                            <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                                <input 
                                    type="radio" 
                                    name="apiMode" 
                                    checked={newApi.mode === 'TEST'} 
                                    onChange={() => setNewApi({...newApi, mode: 'TEST'})} 
                                />
                                <span className="text-sm text-orange-600 font-bold">TEST (Sahte Sipariş)</span>
                            </label>
                        </div>
                        <button onClick={handleAddApi} className="w-full mt-4 bg-blue-600 text-white py-2 rounded hover:bg-blue-700">API Ekle</button>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                        {db.apiConfigs.map(api => (
                            <div key={api.id} className="flex justify-between items-center p-4 border rounded bg-white">
                                <div>
                                    <div className="font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
                                        {api.storeName}
                                        <span className={`text-[10px] px-2 rounded-full text-white ${api.mode === 'LIVE' ? 'bg-green-600' : 'bg-orange-500'}`}>
                                            {api.mode === 'LIVE' ? 'CANLI' : 'TEST'}
                                        </span>
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">{api.apiKey.substring(0, 8)}...</div>
                                </div>
                                <button onClick={() => handleDeleteApi(api.id)} className="text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 p-2 rounded"><Trash size={16} /></button>
                            </div>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            )}

            {activeTab === 'users' && (
                <div>
                     <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-6">Kullanıcı Profilleri</h3>
                     <div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-2 mb-6 bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded border relative">
                        {isEditingUser && (
                            <button 
                                onClick={resetUserForm}
                                className="absolute -top-3 -right-3 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-full p-1 shadow hover:bg-red-600"
                                title="İptal Et"
                            >
                                <X size={14} />
                            </button>
                        )}
                        <input className="border p-2 rounded col-span-1" placeholder="Ad Soyad" value={userForm.name} onChange={e => setUserForm({...userForm, name: e.target.value})} />
                        <input className="border p-2 rounded col-span-1" placeholder="Kullanıcı Adı" value={userForm.username} onChange={e => setUserForm({...userForm, username: e.target.value})} />
                        <input className="border p-2 rounded col-span-1" placeholder="Şifre" value={userForm.password} onChange={e => setUserForm({...userForm, password: e.target.value})} />
                        <select className="border p-2 rounded col-span-1" value={userForm.role} onChange={e => setUserForm({...userForm, role: e.target.value as UserRole})}>
                            <option value={UserRole.USER}>Personel</option>
                            <option value={UserRole.ADMIN}>Yönetici</option>
                        </select>
                        <button 
                            onClick={handleSaveUser} 
                            className={`${isEditingUser ? 'bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700' : 'bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700'} text-white rounded col-span-1 flex justify-center items-center`}
                        >
                            {isEditingUser ? <Save size={16} className="mr-2"/> : <UserPlus size={16} className="mr-2"/>}
                            {isEditingUser ? 'Güncelle' : 'Ekle'}
                        </button>
                     </div>

                     <table className="w-full text-left text-sm border-collapse border border-gray-200">
                        <thead className="bg-gray-100">
                            <tr>
                                <th className="p-2 border">Ad</th>
                                <th className="p-2 border">Kullanıcı Adı</th>
                                <th className="p-2 border">Rol</th>
                                <th className="p-2 border text-right">İşlem</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            {db.users.map(u => (
                                <tr key={u.id} className={`border-b ${isEditingUser && userForm.id === u.id ? 'bg-orange-50' : ''}`}>
                                    <td className="p-2 border">{u.name}</td>
                                    <td className="p-2 border">{u.username}</td>
                                    <td className="p-2 border">
                                        <span className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs text-white ${u.role === UserRole.ADMIN ? 'bg-purple-600' : 'bg-gray-500'}`}>
                                            {u.role}
                                        </span>
                                    </td>
                                    <td className="p-2 border text-right">
                                        <button onClick={() => handleEditUserClick(u)} className="text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-100 p-1 rounded mr-2" title="Düzenle">
                                            <Edit size={14} />
                                        </button>
                                        <button onClick={() => handleDeleteUser(u.id)} className="text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 p-1 rounded" title="Sil">
                                            <Trash size={14} />
                                        </button>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            ))}
                        </tbody>
                     </table>
                </div>
            )}

            {activeTab === 'system' && (
                <div className="space-y-8">
                     <div>
                        <h3 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Otomasyon Ayarları</h3>
                        
                        <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between border p-3 rounded bg-gray-50">
                                <div>
                                    <h4 className="font-bold text-sm">Otomatik Sipariş Çekme</h4>
                                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Belirtilen aralıklarla pazaryerlerinden yeni siparişleri kontrol eder.</p>
                                </div>
                                <button 
                                    onClick={() => updateDB({...db, settings: {...db.settings, enableAutoOrderFetch: !db.settings.enableAutoOrderFetch}})}
                                    className={`relative inline-flex h-6 w-11 items-center rounded-full transition-colors ${db.settings.enableAutoOrderFetch ? 'bg-blue-600' : 'bg-gray-200'}`}
                                >
                                    <span className={`inline-block h-4 w-4 transform rounded-full bg-white transition-transform ${db.settings.enableAutoOrderFetch ? 'translate-x-6' : 'translate-x-1'}`} />
                                </button>
                            </div>

                            {db.settings.enableAutoOrderFetch && (
                                <div className="flex items-center gap-4 p-3 ml-4 border-l-2 border-gray-300">
                                    <label className="text-sm font-medium">Sipariş Çekme Aralığı (dk):</label>
                                    <input 
                                        type="number" 
                                        className="border p-1 rounded w-20 text-center"
                                        value={db.settings.autoFetchIntervalMinutes}
                                        onChange={(e) => updateDB({...db, settings: {...db.settings, autoFetchIntervalMinutes: Number(e.target.value)}})}
                                    />
                                </div>
                            )}

                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between border p-3 rounded bg-gray-50">
                                <div>
                                    <h4 className="font-bold text-sm">Otomatik Stok Gönderimi</h4>
                                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Ürün stoğu değiştiğinde veya sipariş geldiğinde pazaryerlerine anlık güncelleme gönderir.</p>
                                </div>
                                <button 
                                    onClick={() => updateDB({...db, settings: {...db.settings, enableAutoStockSync: !db.settings.enableAutoStockSync}})}
                                    className={`relative inline-flex h-6 w-11 items-center rounded-full transition-colors ${db.settings.enableAutoStockSync ? 'bg-green-600' : 'bg-gray-200'}`}
                                >
                                    <span className={`inline-block h-4 w-4 transform rounded-full bg-white transition-transform ${db.settings.enableAutoStockSync ? 'translate-x-6' : 'translate-x-1'}`} />
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                     </div>

                     <div className="border-t pt-6">
                         <h3 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Manuel İşlemler</h3>
                         <div className="bg-orange-50 p-4 border border-orange-200 rounded">
                             <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                                 <div>
                                     <h4 className="font-bold text-orange-800">Tüm Stokları Yeniden Gönder</h4>
                                     <p className="text-xs text-orange-700 mt-1">
                                         Veritabanındaki TÜM ürün stoklarını pazaryerlerine zorla gönderir.
                                     </p>
                                 </div>
                                 <button 
                                    onClick={handleBulkStockUpdate} 
                                    disabled={isSyncingStocks}
                                    className="bg-orange-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded hover:bg-orange-700 disabled:opacity-50 flex items-center"
                                 >
                                     {isSyncingStocks ? <Loader2 className="animate-spin mr-2"/> : <UploadCloud className="mr-2"/>}
                                     Şimdi Gönder
                                 </button>
                             </div>
                         </div>
                     </div>

                     <div className="border-t pt-6">
                        <h3 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Veri Yedekleme</h3>
                        <div className="flex gap-4">
                            <button onClick={exportBackup} className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded flex items-center hover:bg-indigo-700">
                                <Save className="mr-2" /> Yedeği İndir
                            </button>
                            <label className="bg-gray-600 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded flex items-center hover:bg-gray-700 cursor-pointer">
                                <RotateCcw className="mr-2" /> Yedeği Geri Yükle
                                <input type="file" className="hidden" accept=".json" onChange={(e) => {
                                    if(e.target.files?.[0]) importBackup(e.target.files[0], () => window.location.reload());
                                }} />
                            </label>
                        </div>
                     </div>
                </div>
            )}
        </div>
    </div>
  );
};

```

Stok gönderim sistemi barkod bazlı olacak şekilde güncellendi. Yapılan değişiklikler:

## Yapılan değişiklikler

### 1. **Barkod bazlı stok gönderimi**
   - `syncSingleBarcodeStock`: Tek bir barkod için stok gönderir
   - `syncBarcodeStock`: Bir barkod için tüm pazaryerlerine stok gönderir
   - Her barkod kendi stok değeriyle gönderilir

### 2. **Trendyol API entegrasyonu**
   - Gerçek Trendyol API endpoint'i kullanılıyor: `/suppliers/{supplierId}/products/price-and-inventory`
   - Her barkod için ayrı API isteği gönderiliyor
   - TEST ve LIVE modları destekleniyor

### 3. **Otomatik stok gönderimi**
   - Sipariş geldiğinde: Her barkod için kendi stok değeri gönderiliyor
   - Ürün güncellendiğinde: Her barkod için kendi stok değeri gönderiliyor
   - İade alındığında: Her barkod için kendi stok değeri gönderiliyor

### 4. **Toplu stok gönderimi (Settings)**
   - Tüm barkodlar için stok gönderimi
   - Her barkod için programdaki stok değeri Trendyol'a gönderiliyor
   - İlerleme takibi ve hata raporlama eklendi

### 5. **Manuel stok gönderimi (Product Management)**
   - Seçili ürünlerin tüm barkodları için stok gönderimi
   - Her barkod için kendi stok değeri gönderiliyor

## Nasıl çalışıyor?

1. Programdaki stok: Her barkod için sistemdeki stok değeri kullanılıyor
2. Trendyol'a gönderim: Her barkod için ayrı API isteği gönderiliyor
3. Stok değeri: Programdaki barkod stoğu ne ise o değer Trendyol'a gönderiliyor

Sistem artık barkod bazlı çalışıyor. Her barkodun kendi stok değeri Trendyol'a gönderiliyor.

---

**User**

tamam şimdi derle exe halinde güncelle

---

**Cursor**

Projeyi derleyip exe oluşturuyorum:


Vite build tamamlandı. Electron-builder ile exe oluşturuyorum:


Build tamamlandı. Release klasörünü kontrol ediyorum:


Build tamamlandı. Exe dosyası oluşturuldu.

## Oluşturulan dosyalar

**Konum:** `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\kontrol - Kopya\release\`

1. **E-Ticaret Yönetim Paneli Setup 1.0.0.exe** (88.9 MB)
   - Kurulum dosyası (installer)
   - Bu dosyayı çalıştırarak uygulamayı kurabilirsiniz

2. **E-Ticaret Yönetim Paneli Setup 1.0.0.exe.blockmap**
   - Güncelleme için kullanılan blockmap dosyası

3. **win-unpacked** klasörü
   - Kurulum gerektirmeden çalıştırılabilen exe dosyası
   - `release\win-unpacked\E-Ticaret Yönetim Paneli.exe`

## Yapılan güncellemeler

- Barkod bazlı stok gönderim sistemi
- Trendyol API entegrasyonu
- Sipariş detay sayfası güncellemeleri
- Satıcı stok kodu kolonu ve sıralama
- Hata düzeltmeleri ve iyileştirmeler

Exe dosyası kullanıma hazır. Kurulum dosyasını paylaşabilir veya doğrudan `win-unpacked` klasöründeki exe'yi çalıştırabilirsiniz.

---

**User**

Sipariş yönetimi, sipariş alanına siarpişe tıkladığımda pazaryeri güncelleme başarısızi bildirimi geliyor, ayrıca siarpiş askıda iken yazdırdığımda sipariş detaynda ürün adı Trenyol adı, siarpişler alanınada yazdırdığım zaman ürün adı programdaki ad, Ürün adı ve varyant bilgisi, tüm yazdırmalarda trenyoldan çeksin, ayrıca sipariş askıdan siapriş alanına düştükten sonra bir müddtet sonra tekrardan askıya gidebiliyor, bunu engelle, ayrıca Trenyoldan siarpiş tetaylarında ne kadar bilgi varsa çeksin,  teslimat adresi mevcut değil bilgisi yazıyor sipariş detayında, ayrıca ben yazıcı şablonunu a5 ayarlıyorum, yazdır dediğimde çıktı pdf sayfası a4 olarak çıkartıyor.

---

**Cursor**

Sorunları tek tek ele alıyorum. Önce mevcut kodu inceliyorum:


Sorunları tek tek ele alıyorum:


Sorunları düzeltiyorum:


```typescript

export enum UserRole {
  ADMIN = 'ADMIN',
  USER = 'USER',
}

export enum OrderStatus {
  NEW = 'Yeni Sipariş',
  PROCESSING = 'İşleme Alındı',
  SHIPPING = 'Taşıma Durumunda',
  DELIVERED = 'Teslim Edildi',
  CANCELLED = 'İptal Edildi',
}

export interface User {
  id: string;
  username: string;
  password: string; // In real app, hash this
  role: UserRole;
  name: string;
}

export interface Warehouse {
  id: string;
  name: string;
}

export interface Variant {
  id: string;
  color: string;
  size: string;
  barcode: string;
  stocks: Record<string, number>; // warehouseId -> quantity
}

export interface Product {
  id: string;
  productCode: string;
  name: string;
  season: string;
  group: string;
  price: number;
  date: string;
  variants: Variant[];
}

export interface OrderItem {
  barcode: string;
  productName: string;
  sku: string;
  color: string;
  size: string;
  quantity: number;
  unitPrice: number;
  totalPrice: number;
}

export interface Order {
  id: string;
  marketplaceOrderId: string;
  storeName: string; // From API config
  status: OrderStatus;
  customerName: string;
  deliveryAddress?: string; // New Field
  cargoCode: string;
  orderDate: string;
  items: OrderItem[];
  isSuspended?: boolean; // If barcode not found in system
  isPrinted?: boolean; // Track if order has been printed
  wasSuspended?: boolean; // If order was previously suspended and resolved
}

export interface ReturnRecord {
  id: string;
  orderId: string;
  marketplaceOrderId: string;
  customerName: string;
  item: OrderItem;
  returnQuantity: number;
  returnDate: string;
  reason?: string;
}

export interface ApiConfig {
  id: string;
  storeName: string; // Acts as identifier
  apiKey: string;
  apiSecret: string;
  supplierId: string;
  mode: 'LIVE' | 'TEST';
}

export interface AppSettings {
  autoFetchIntervalMinutes: number;
  enableAutoStockSync: boolean; // New Setting
  enableAutoOrderFetch: boolean; // New Setting
  printTemplate: {
    showOrderNo: boolean;
    showCargo: boolean;
    fontSize: number;
    barcodeFormat: 'CODE128' | 'QR';
  };
}

// For mock data persistence
export interface Database {
  users: User[];
  products: Product[];
  warehouses: Warehouse[];
  orders: Order[];
  returns: ReturnRecord[];
  apiConfigs: ApiConfig[];
  settings: AppSettings;
  currentUser: User | null;
}

```

```typescriptreact

import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { Database, Order, OrderStatus, OrderItem, ReturnRecord, Product } from '../types';
import { RefreshCcw, Printer, Play, Filter, PauseCircle, AlertTriangle, Loader2, RotateCcw, ChevronDown, CheckSquare, Square, ClipboardCheck, FileSpreadsheet, LayoutTemplate, Save, Eye, ArrowLeftRight, Bell, FileText, SearchCheck, HardDrive, ArrowUp, ArrowDown } from 'lucide-react';
import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';
import * as XLSX from 'xlsx';
import { syncStockToMarketplaces, syncBarcodeStock, updateLocalStockWithConsistency, syncOrderStatusToMarketplaces } from '../services/integration';
// @ts-ignore
import JsBarcode from 'jsbarcode';

const uuid = () => Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);

interface Props {
  db: Database;
  updateDB: (newDB: Database) => void;
}

interface PrintElement {
    id: string;
    label: string;
    key: string; // Key in Order object or special key like 'itemsTable'
    x: number;
    y: number;
    fontSize: number;
    width?: number; // For container width
    visible: boolean;
    isBarcode?: boolean;
}

interface PrintConfig {
    paperSize: 'A4' | 'A5' | 'Thermal' | 'Custom';
    customWidth?: number;
    customHeight?: number;
    elements: PrintElement[];
    selectedPrinter?: string;
}

const DEFAULT_PRINT_CONFIG: PrintConfig = {
    paperSize: 'A4',
    selectedPrinter: 'default',
    elements: [
        { id: '1', label: 'Mağaza Adı', key: 'storeName', x: 20, y: 20, fontSize: 18, visible: true },
        { id: '2', label: 'Müşteri Adı', key: 'customerName', x: 20, y: 50, fontSize: 14, visible: true },
        { id: '3', label: 'Sipariş No', key: 'marketplaceOrderId', x: 20, y: 40, fontSize: 12, visible: true },
        { id: '4', label: 'Kargo Kodu', key: 'cargoCode', x: 130, y: 20, fontSize: 14, visible: true, isBarcode: true },
        { id: '5', label: 'Ürün Listesi', key: 'items', x: 20, y: 80, fontSize: 10, width: 170, visible: true },
        { id: '6', label: 'Tarih', key: 'orderDate', x: 150, y: 280, fontSize: 10, visible: true },
        { id: '7', label: 'Adres', key: 'deliveryAddress', x: 20, y: 60, fontSize: 10, width: 100, visible: true },
        { id: '8', label: 'Not', key: 'customNote', x: 20, y: 250, fontSize: 12, width: 150, visible: true },
    ]
};

export const OrderManagement: React.FC<Props> = ({ db, updateDB }) => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'active' | 'cancelled' | 'suspended' | 'returned'>('active');
  const [selectedOrders, setSelectedOrders] = useState<string[]>([]);
  // Search and Filter States
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [dateFilter, setDateFilter] = useState('');
  const [printedFilter, setPrintedFilter] = useState<'all' | 'printed' | 'unprinted'>('all');
  const [isSyncing, setIsSyncing] = useState(false);
  const [isStatusUpdating, setIsStatusUpdating] = useState(false);

  // Notifications
  const [notification, setNotification] = useState<{message: string, type: 'info'|'success'} | null>(null);

  // Status Filter State
  const [statusFilterOpen, setStatusFilterOpen] = useState(false);
  const [selectedStatuses, setSelectedStatuses] = useState<OrderStatus[]>([OrderStatus.NEW, OrderStatus.PROCESSING]);
  const statusDropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  // Return Modal State
  const [isReturnModalOpen, setIsReturnModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [returnOrderTarget, setReturnOrderTarget] = useState<Order | null>(null);
  const [returnQuantities, setReturnQuantities] = useState<{[barcode: string]: number}>({});

  // Order Detail Modal State
  const [detailOrder, setDetailOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);

  // Print Designer State
  const [isPrintModalOpen, setIsPrintModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [printConfig, setPrintConfig] = useState<PrintConfig>(DEFAULT_PRINT_CONFIG);
  const [printNote, setPrintNote] = useState(''); // User custom note text
  
  // Printer Detection State
  const [availablePrinters, setAvailablePrinters] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [isScanningPrinters, setIsScanningPrinters] = useState(false);

  // Sorting State
  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState<'sku' | null>(null);
  const [sortOrder, setSortOrder] = useState<'asc' | 'desc'>('asc');

  // --- Auto-Fetch Logic ---
  useEffect(() => {
    // Only run interval if Auto Fetch is enabled in settings
    if (db.settings.enableAutoOrderFetch && db.settings.autoFetchIntervalMinutes > 0) {
      const interval = setInterval(() => {
        fetchOrdersFromMarketplaces(false); // False = Auto fetch
      }, db.settings.autoFetchIntervalMinutes * 60 * 1000);
      return () => clearInterval(interval);
    }
  }, [db.settings.autoFetchIntervalMinutes, db.settings.enableAutoOrderFetch, db.apiConfigs]);

  // Handle clicking outside filter dropdown
  useEffect(() => {
      const handleClickOutside = (event: MouseEvent) => {
          if (statusDropdownRef.current && !statusDropdownRef.current.contains(event.target as Node)) {
              setStatusFilterOpen(false);
          }
      };
      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
      return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
  }, []);

  // Notification Timer
  useEffect(() => {
      if(notification) {
          const timer = setTimeout(() => setNotification(null), 4000);
          return () => clearTimeout(timer);
      }
  }, [notification]);

  // Load saved print template on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('printConfig');
    if (saved) {
      try {
        const config = JSON.parse(saved);
        setPrintConfig(config);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Failed to load saved print config:', error);
      }
    }
  }, []);

  // Barcode Generation for Print View
  useEffect(() => {
      const timer = setTimeout(() => {
         if (window.document.querySelectorAll('.barcode-render').length > 0) {
             JsBarcode(".barcode-render").init();
         }
      }, 500); 
      return () => clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [isPrintModalOpen, selectedOrders, printConfig]); // Re-run when config changes to update live preview

  const fetchOrdersFromMarketplaces = async (isManual = false) => {
    if (db.apiConfigs.length === 0) {
        if(isManual) alert("Tanımlı API bulunamadı. Ayarlar sayfasından mağaza ekleyiniz.");
        return;
    }

    setIsSyncing(true);
    let newOrdersAddedCount = 0;
    
    let currentDbProducts = [...db.products];
    let currentDbOrders = [...db.orders];
    const barcodesToSync: { [key: string]: number } = {}; 

    for (const config of db.apiConfigs) {
        let content = [];
        
        // --- TEST MODE or API FALLBACK ---
        if (config.mode === 'TEST') {
             if (isManual || Math.random() > 0.7) {
                // ... Existing Test Mock Logic ...
                let mockVariant = { barcode: 'TEST-BARCODE', color: 'X', size: 'L' };
                let mockProductName = "Test Ürünü";
                let mockPrice = 100;

                if (currentDbProducts.length > 0) {
                    const randomProduct = currentDbProducts[Math.floor(Math.random() * currentDbProducts.length)];
                    const randomVariant = randomProduct.variants.find(v => v.barcode && v.barcode.length > 0) || randomProduct.variants[0];
                    if(randomVariant) {
                        mockVariant = randomVariant;
                        mockProductName = randomProduct.name;
                        mockPrice = randomProduct.price;
                    }
                } else {
                    mockVariant = { barcode: 'UNKNOWN-BARCODE-' + Math.floor(Math.random()*100), color: '?', size: '?' };
                }

                content = [{
                    orderNumber: `TEST-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000000)}`,
                    customerFirstName: "Test",
                    customerLastName: "Müşteri",
                    cargoTrackingNumber: `${Math.floor(Math.random() * 10000000)}`,
                    orderDate: Date.now(),
                    status: 'Created',
                    lines: [{
                        barcode: mockVariant.barcode,
                        productName: mockProductName,
                        merchantSku: `${mockVariant.color}-${mockVariant.size}`,
                        quantity: Math.floor(Math.random() * 2) + 1,
                        price: mockPrice
                    }]
                }];
             }
        } else {
            // --- LIVE MODE ---
            try {
                const auth = btoa(`${config.apiKey}:${config.apiSecret}`);
                const startDate = new Date();
                startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - 14); 
                const startDateParams = startDate.getTime();

                const url = `https://api.trendyol.com/sapigw/suppliers/${config.supplierId}/orders?orderBy=LastUpdateDate&order=DESC&size=50&startDate=${startDateParams}`;

                const response = await fetch(url, {
                    method: 'GET',
                    headers: {
                        'Authorization': `Basic ${auth}`,
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                        'User-Agent': `${config.supplierId} - SelfIntegration`
                    }
                });

                if (response.ok) {
                    const data = await response.json();
                    content = data.content || [];
                } else {
                    console.error(`API Response Status: ${response.status}`);
                }

            } catch (error) {
                console.warn(`[Live] API unavailable for ${config.storeName}.`);
            }
        }

        for (const apiOrder of content) {
            
            // Map status
            let mappedStatus = OrderStatus.NEW;
            if (apiOrder.status === 'Shipped') mappedStatus = OrderStatus.SHIPPING;
            if (apiOrder.status === 'Delivered') mappedStatus = OrderStatus.DELIVERED;
            if (apiOrder.status === 'Cancelled') mappedStatus = OrderStatus.CANCELLED;
            if (apiOrder.status === 'Created') mappedStatus = OrderStatus.NEW;
            if (apiOrder.status === 'Picking') mappedStatus = OrderStatus.PROCESSING;

            // Check if order exists
            const existingOrderIndex = currentDbOrders.findIndex(o => o.marketplaceOrderId === apiOrder.orderNumber);

            if (existingOrderIndex > -1) {
                const existingOrder = currentDbOrders[existingOrderIndex];
                // Sipariş zaten var - sadece durum güncelle
                if (existingOrder.status !== mappedStatus) {
                    currentDbOrders[existingOrderIndex].status = mappedStatus;
                }
                // ÖNEMLİ: Askıdan çıkan siparişlerin tekrar askıya gitmesini engelle
                // Eğer sipariş daha önce askıdan çıktıysa (wasSuspended=true), tekrar askıya gönderme
                if (existingOrder.wasSuspended || !existingOrder.isSuspended) {
                    // Sipariş artık askıda değil veya daha önce askıdan çıktı, tekrar kontrol etme
                    continue; 
                }
                // Eğer hala askıda ise ve daha önce çözülmediyse, ürünleri tekrar kontrol et (devam et)
            }

            // ADD NEW ORDER Logic
            if (mappedStatus !== OrderStatus.NEW && mappedStatus !== OrderStatus.PROCESSING) {
                continue;
            }

            const orderItems: OrderItem[] = apiOrder.lines.map((line: any) => ({
                barcode: line.barcode || 'NO-BARCODE',
                productName: line.productName || line.merchantSku || 'Ürün adı mevcut değil',
                sku: line.merchantSku,
                color: line.merchantSku, 
                size: line.quantity + ' Adet', 
                quantity: line.quantity,
                unitPrice: line.price,
                totalPrice: line.price * line.quantity
            }));

            let isSuspended = false;

            const itemsWithSuspensionCheck = orderItems.map(item => {
                const productIndex = currentDbProducts.findIndex(p => p.variants.some(v => v.barcode === item.barcode));

                if (productIndex > -1) {
                    // PRODUCT FOUND IN DB
                    const product = currentDbProducts[productIndex];
                    const variant = product.variants.find(v => v.barcode === item.barcode);

                    if (variant) {
                        item.color = variant.color;
                        item.size = variant.size;
                        item.productName = product.name;

                        const whId = Object.keys(variant.stocks)[0] || 'wh1';
                        const currentStock = variant.stocks[whId] || 0;
                        const newStock = Math.max(0, currentStock - item.quantity);

                        // Update Local Object
                        const result = updateLocalStockWithConsistency(
                            currentDbProducts,
                            product.id,
                            variant.color,
                            variant.size,
                            whId,
                            newStock
                        );
                        
                        currentDbProducts = result.updatedProducts;

                        // Add to Sync Queue ONLY IF product exists (Not suspended)
                        result.affectedBarcodes.forEach(b => {
                            barcodesToSync[b] = newStock;
                        });
                    }
                } else {
                    // PRODUCT NOT FOUND -> SUSPENDED
                    isSuspended = true;
                }
                return item;
            });

            const newOrder: Order = {
                id: uuid(),
                marketplaceOrderId: apiOrder.orderNumber,
                storeName: config.storeName,
                status: mappedStatus,
                customerName: `${apiOrder.customerFirstName} ${apiOrder.customerLastName}`,
                deliveryAddress: apiOrder.shipmentAddress ? 
                    [
                        apiOrder.shipmentAddress.address1 || '',
                        apiOrder.shipmentAddress.address2 || '',
                        apiOrder.shipmentAddress.district || '',
                        apiOrder.shipmentAddress.city || '',
                        apiOrder.shipmentAddress.country || ''
                    ].filter(Boolean).join(', ') || apiOrder.deliveryAddress || 
                    `${apiOrder.customerFirstName} ${apiOrder.customerLastName}\n${apiOrder.address || 'Adres bilgisi mevcut değil'}\n${apiOrder.city || ''} ${apiOrder.district || ''}`,
                cargoCode: String(apiOrder.cargoTrackingNumber || '-'),
                orderDate: new Date(apiOrder.orderDate).toISOString(),
                items: itemsWithSuspensionCheck,
                isSuspended: isSuspended
            };

            currentDbOrders.unshift(newOrder); 
            newOrdersAddedCount++;
        }
    }

    updateDB({ ...db, products: currentDbProducts, orders: currentDbOrders });
    
    // Sync stocks only for non-suspended items AND if setting is enabled
    // Barkod bazlı stok gönderimi - her barkod için ayrı stok değeri
    if (db.settings.enableAutoStockSync) {
        const barcodesList = Object.keys(barcodesToSync);
        if (barcodesList.length > 0) {
            for (const [barcode, qty] of Object.entries(barcodesToSync)) {
                // Her barkod için kendi stok değerini gönder
                await syncBarcodeStock(db.apiConfigs, barcode, qty);
            }
        }
    }

    setIsSyncing(false);

    if (newOrdersAddedCount > 0) {
        setNotification({
            type: 'success',
            message: `${newOrdersAddedCount} yeni sipariş sisteme düştü.`
        });
        
        try {
            const audio = new Audio('https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/2869/2869-preview.mp3');
            audio.volume = 0.5;
            audio.play().catch(() => {});
        } catch(e) {}
    } else if (isManual) {
        alert("Yeni sipariş bulunamadı. Mevcut siparişlerin durumları güncellendi.");
    }
  };

  const handleUpdateStatuses = async () => {
     setIsStatusUpdating(true);
     await fetchOrdersFromMarketplaces(true); // True for manual
     setIsStatusUpdating(false);
  };

  const toggleStatusFilter = (status: OrderStatus) => {
    if (selectedStatuses.includes(status)) {
        if(selectedStatuses.length > 1) { 
            setSelectedStatuses(selectedStatuses.filter(s => s !== status));
        }
    } else {
        setSelectedStatuses([...selectedStatuses, status]);
    }
  };

  const getFilteredOrders = () => {
    let list = db.orders;
    if (activeTab === 'cancelled') {
        list = list.filter(o => o.status === OrderStatus.CANCELLED);
    } else if (activeTab === 'suspended') {
        list = list.filter(o => o.isSuspended);
    } else if (activeTab === 'returned') {
        return []; // We handle this separately in render
    } else {
        list = list.filter(o => !o.isSuspended && o.status !== OrderStatus.CANCELLED);
        // Apply Status Filter only in Active Tab
        list = list.filter(o => selectedStatuses.includes(o.status));
    }
    
    // Apply date filter
    if (dateFilter) {
        list = list.filter(o => {
            const orderDate = new Date(o.orderDate).toISOString().split('T')[0];
            return orderDate === dateFilter;
        });
    }
    
    // Apply printed filter
    if (printedFilter === 'printed') {
        list = list.filter(o => o.isPrinted);
    } else if (printedFilter === 'unprinted') {
        list = list.filter(o => !o.isPrinted);
    }
    
    if (searchTerm) {
        const lower = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
        list = list.filter(o => 
            (o.customerName || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower) || 
            (o.marketplaceOrderId || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
            (o.storeName || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
            (String(o.cargoCode || '')).toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
            o.items.some(i => (i.barcode || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower) || (i.productName || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower) || (i.sku || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower))
        );
    }
    
    // Apply sorting
    if (sortBy === 'sku') {
        list = [...list].sort((a, b) => {
            const aSku = a.items[0]?.sku || '';
            const bSku = b.items[0]?.sku || '';
            const comparison = aSku.localeCompare(bSku, 'tr', { numeric: true, sensitivity: 'base' });
            return sortOrder === 'asc' ? comparison : -comparison;
        });
    }
    
    return list;
  };

  const handleClearFilters = () => {
    setSearchTerm('');
    setDateFilter('');
    setPrintedFilter('all');
    setSelectedStatuses([OrderStatus.NEW, OrderStatus.PROCESSING]);
    setSortBy(null);
    setSortOrder('asc');
  };

  const handleSort = (column: 'sku') => {
    if (sortBy === column) {
      setSortOrder(sortOrder === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc');
    } else {
      setSortBy(column);
      setSortOrder('asc');
    }
  };

  const getFilteredReturns = () => {
      let list = db.returns || [];
      if (searchTerm) {
        const lower = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
        list = list.filter(r => 
            (r.customerName || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower) || 
            (r.marketplaceOrderId || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
            (r.item.productName || '').toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
            (r.item.barcode || '').includes(lower)
        );
      }
      return list;
  };

  // --- ACTIONS ---

  // Fetch order details from Trendyol API
  const fetchOrderDetailsFromTrendyol = async (order: Order): Promise<Order | null> => {
    if (!db.apiConfigs.length) return null;
    
    const config = db.apiConfigs.find(c => c.storeName === order.storeName);
    if (!config) return null;

    try {
        const auth = btoa(`${config.apiKey}:${config.apiSecret}`);
        const url = `https://api.trendyol.com/sapigw/suppliers/${config.supplierId}/orders/${order.marketplaceOrderId}`;

        const response = await fetch(url, {
            method: 'GET',
            headers: {
                'Authorization': `Basic ${auth}`,
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                'User-Agent': `${config.supplierId} - SelfIntegration`
            }
        });

        if (!response.ok) {
            const errorText = await response.text();
            console.error(`API Error ${response.status}:`, errorText);
            return null;
        }

            const data = await response.json();
        
        // Build delivery address from API data - Trendyol API format
        let deliveryAddress = '';
        if (data.shipmentAddress) {
            const addr = data.shipmentAddress;
            deliveryAddress = [
                addr.address1 || '',
                addr.address2 || '',
                addr.district || '',
                addr.city || '',
                addr.country || ''
            ].filter(Boolean).join(', ');
        } else if (data.deliveryAddress) {
            deliveryAddress = data.deliveryAddress;
        } else if (data.address) {
            deliveryAddress = data.address;
        } else if (data.shipmentPackageHistories && data.shipmentPackageHistories.length > 0) {
            // Try shipment package histories
            const pkg = data.shipmentPackageHistories[0];
            if (pkg.shipmentAddress) {
                const addr = pkg.shipmentAddress;
                deliveryAddress = [
                    addr.address1 || '',
                    addr.address2 || '',
                    addr.district || '',
                    addr.city || '',
                    addr.country || ''
                ].filter(Boolean).join(', ');
            }
        }
        
        // Update order with fresh marketplace data - Tüm bilgileri Trendyol'dan çek
        const updatedOrder: Order = {
                ...order,
            customerName: `${data.customerFirstName || data.customerName || ''} ${data.customerLastName || ''}`.trim() || order.customerName,
            deliveryAddress: deliveryAddress || order.deliveryAddress || 'Adres bilgisi mevcut değil',
            cargoCode: String(data.cargoTrackingNumber || data.trackingNumber || data.shipmentPackageHistories?.[0]?.trackingNumber || order.cargoCode || '-'),
            items: (data.lines || data.items || []).map((line: any) => ({
                    barcode: line.barcode || 'NO-BARCODE',
                productName: line.productName || line.name || 'Ürün adı mevcut değil',
                sku: line.merchantSku || line.sku || '',
                // Varyant bilgilerini Trendyol'dan çek
                color: line.attributes?.find((attr: any) => attr.attributeName === 'Renk' || attr.attributeName === 'Color')?.attributeValue || line.merchantSku || '',
                size: line.attributes?.find((attr: any) => attr.attributeName === 'Beden' || attr.attributeName === 'Size')?.attributeValue || (line.quantity + ' Adet'),
                quantity: line.quantity || 1,
                unitPrice: line.price || line.unitPrice || 0,
                totalPrice: (line.price || line.unitPrice || 0) * (line.quantity || 1)
                }))
            };

        return updatedOrder;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Order refresh error:', error);
        return null;
    }
  };

  const handleOrderDetailRefresh = async (order: Order) => {
    setNotification({ type: 'info', message: 'Sipariş detayları güncelleniyor...' });
    
    const updatedOrder = await fetchOrderDetailsFromTrendyol(order);
    
    if (updatedOrder) {
            // Update in database
            const updatedOrders = db.orders.map(o => o.id === order.id ? updatedOrder : o);
            updateDB({ ...db, orders: updatedOrders });
            setDetailOrder(updatedOrder);
            setNotification({ type: 'success', message: 'Sipariş detayları pazaryerinden güncellendi.' });
        } else {
        // API'den veri çekilemedi, mevcut siparişi göster ama hata mesajı verme
        setDetailOrder(order);
        // Sessizce başarısız ol, kullanıcıya mevcut veriyi göster
    }
  };

  const handleProcessOrders = async () => {
    const ordersToProcess = db.orders.filter(o => selectedOrders.includes(o.id) && o.status === OrderStatus.NEW);
    if (ordersToProcess.length === 0) return;

    const newOrders = db.orders.map(o => {
        if (selectedOrders.includes(o.id) && o.status === OrderStatus.NEW) {
            return { ...o, status: OrderStatus.PROCESSING };
        }
        return o;
    });
    updateDB({ ...db, orders: newOrders });
    
    // Sync to marketplaces with better error handling
    try {
        await syncOrderStatusToMarketplaces(db.apiConfigs, ordersToProcess, OrderStatus.PROCESSING);
        setNotification({
            type: 'success',
            message: `${ordersToProcess.length} sipariş işleme alındı ve pazaryerlerine bildirildi.`
        });
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Marketplace sync error:', error);
        setNotification({
            type: 'info', 
            message: `${ordersToProcess.length} sipariş işleme alındı (pazaryerlerine gönderilemedi).`
        });
    }
    setSelectedOrders([]);
  };

  const handleExportOrders = () => {
      const orders = activeTab === 'returned' ? [] : getFilteredOrders();
      if (orders.length === 0 && activeTab !== 'returned') return alert("Raporlanacak veri bulunamadı.");
      
      let data = [];
      if (activeTab === 'returned') {
          data = getFilteredReturns().map(r => ({
              'Mağaza': '',
              'Sipariş No': r.marketplaceOrderId,
              'Müşteri': r.customerName,
              'Ürün': r.item.productName,
              'İade Adet': r.returnQuantity,
              'Tarih': r.returnDate
          }));
      } else {
          data = orders.map(o => ({
              'Mağaza': o.storeName,
              'Sipariş No': o.marketplaceOrderId,
              'Müşteri': o.customerName
          }));
      }

      const worksheet = XLSX.utils.json_to_sheet(data);
      const workbook = XLSX.utils.book_new();
      XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(workbook, worksheet, activeTab === 'returned' ? "Iadeler" : "Siparişler");
      XLSX.writeFile(workbook, "Rapor.xlsx");
  };

  // --- SUSPENDED ORDER CHECK ---
  const handleCheckSuspended = async (order: Order) => {
      // Önce Trendyol'dan güncel sipariş detaylarını çek
      const trendyolOrder = await fetchOrderDetailsFromTrendyol(order);
      
      let currentProducts = [...db.products];
      let barcodesToSync: { [key: string]: number } = {};
      let allItemsFound = true;

      // Trendyol'dan gelen verileri kullan, yoksa mevcut verileri kullan
      const itemsToProcess = trendyolOrder?.items || order.items;

      const newItems = itemsToProcess.map(item => {
          // Try to find product
          const productIndex = currentProducts.findIndex(p => p.variants.some(v => v.barcode === item.barcode));
          
          if (productIndex > -1) {
               const product = currentProducts[productIndex];
               const variant = product.variants.find(v => v.barcode === item.barcode);

               if (variant) {
                   // Deduct stock now since we missed it when order first came
                   const whId = Object.keys(variant.stocks)[0] || 'wh1';
                   const currentStock = variant.stocks[whId] || 0;
                   const newStock = Math.max(0, currentStock - item.quantity);

                   const result = updateLocalStockWithConsistency(
                       currentProducts,
                       product.id,
                       variant.color,
                       variant.size,
                       whId,
                       newStock
                   );
                   currentProducts = result.updatedProducts;
                   result.affectedBarcodes.forEach(b => {
                       barcodesToSync[b] = newStock;
                   });

                   // Trendyol'dan gelen ürün adı ve varyant bilgilerini kullan
                   return {
                       ...item,
                       // Trendyol'dan gelen veriler varsa onları kullan
                       productName: trendyolOrder ? item.productName : product.name,
                       color: trendyolOrder ? item.color : variant.color,
                       size: trendyolOrder ? item.size : variant.size
                   };
               }
          }
          allItemsFound = false;
```
